Abbot Tsujon.name: Abbot Tsujon
Abbot Tsujon.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. death effects

items.name: Absorb Worldly Influence
items.description:
Триггер: Abbot Tsujon is within the emanation of a magical area effect as it's being created

Требования: Abbot Tsujon is wielding a khakkhara

Эффект: Abbot Tsujon uses her khakkhara as a medium to absorb the incoming area effect into its central ring. She attempts to counteract the triggering effect. For 1 round after Absorbing Worldly Influence, a glowing orb floats within the khakkhara's central ring, allowing Tsujon to Release Worldly Passions

items.name: Crying Bell Stance
items.description: Abbot Tsujon cups one hand and poses the other to strike it, like the Rai Sho Monastery's central bell. In this stance, they can make temple bell Strikes (see Strikes). While in this stance, she gains a +2 status bonus to AC against ranged attacks.

items.name: Falling Sal Stance
items.description: Abbot Tsujon joins their palms together in the shape of a sal flower, evoking the truth that all things eventually decay. In this stance, they can make sal blossom Strikes (see Strikes) and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened 1}, and can use the extra action only to cast wholeness of body.

items.name: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти
Всё это уже случалось
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Триггер: Abbot Tsujon is about to roll initiative

Эффект: Abbot Tsujon experiences a flash of recognition from a previous existence, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to the triggering roll.

If this causes Abbot Tsujon to be the first creature to act, they also become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] for 1 round, but they can use the extra action only to Recall Knowledge or Step.

items.name: Это всё случится вновь
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Триггер: Abbot Tsujon fails or critically fails a Will save against an emotion effect

Эффект: Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, Abbot Tsujon finds solace in the notion that all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle. They reroll the saving throw with a +1 status bonus; they must use the second result.

items.name: Release Worldly Passions
items.description:
Требования: Abbot Tsujon's khakkhara holds a glowing orb from Absorb Worldly Influence

Эффект: Abbot Tsujon strikes her prayer staff once upon the ground, releasing the energy she captured in it along with the jingling of its rings. She blasts a wave of force in a 30- foot emanation, dealing @Damage[2d6[force]] damage per level of the ability she counteracted (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). If the ability she counteracted usually deals energy damage, she can choose to deal this type of damage instead (for instance, if she used Absorb Worldly Influence to counteract a fireball, she could deal either fire or force damage).

items.name: Stunning Flurry
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Abbot Tsujon makes two Strikes, each of which must be an unarmed Strike or crying temple bell Strike. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:39|traits:incapacitation] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure); this save has the incapacitation trait.

Air Rift.name: Air Rift
Air Rift.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:38|name:Air Rift Arcana|traits:hazard,environmental,magical,air] (master) to sew the magical threads of the rift shut, @Check[nature|dc:40|name:Air Rift Nature|traits:hazard,environmental,magical,air] or @Check[survival|dc:40|name:Air Rift Survival|traits:hazard,environmental,magical,air] (legendary) to open enough windows and doors to reduce its intensity, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th level; counteract DC 34) to counteract the air rift
Air Rift.routine:
(1 action) Winds blow through the area in a random direction, causing creatures and objects within 50 feet of the air rift to float up, down, north, south, east, or west (roll a d6 to determine which direction). Creatures and objects in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|traits:damaging-effect,air,environmental,magical,hazard] save. If a creature is pushed into a solid object or another creature by this effect, both take @Damage[(3d8+15)[bludgeoning]] damage on impact.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pushed 10 feet, but takes only half damage from impact.

Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet, falls prone, and takes full damage from impact.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 40 feet, falls prone, and takes double damage from impact.
Air Rift.stealth: (master) to notice the sudden breeze in the theater
Air Rift.Hdescription: A portal to the Plane of Air rips open onstage, causing roaring winds to tear through the opera house

Angoyang.name: Angoyang
Angoyang.description:
Angoyangs resemble white cats with black stripes like those of a tiger. They have beautifully silken fur, piercing blue eyes, and long fluffy tails. Yet, far from the picturesque feline companions they appear to be, angoyangs are actually terrifying beasts capable of peeling back the fleshy layers of their face to reveal a mass of long, toothed tentacles.

Although most cats instinctively avoid areas where angoyangs roam, the unlucky felines who do encounter this creature are invariably entangled in the monster's toothy tentacles and devoured. In cities and towns where angoyangs reside, cat owners may find that their beloved pets have gone missing only to soon have a fluffy black-and-white cat coincidentally appear at their doorstep, looking up at them with wide eyes and mewing adorably. Angoyangs almost never attack their caretakers, who they see as loyal servants that feed, clean up after, and pamper them, and the creatures protect the people in their household from any would-be intruders. However, a caretaker who mistreats or neglects their angoyang ward is often met with a grisly fate. More than one coroner or gravedigger has inadvertently inherited an angoyang after being assigned to clean up the mutilated remains of a previous "owner."

items.name: Dander Scent (Imprecise) 1 mile
items.description: The angoyang can imprecisely sense the location of any creature within 1 mile that has previously come in contact with the angoyang's fur.

items.name: I Am A Cat
items.description: The angoyang has an automatic result of 47 to Deception checks and DCs to appear as a cat.

items.name: Silent Yowl
items.description:
The angoyang opens its mouth and drops its innocent disguise, releasing its monstrous tentacles and letting out a blood-curdling scream directed at a single target that it can see to deal @Damage[8d10[mental]] damage. Only the target of this ability can hear this scream. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:30|traits:damaging-effect] save as the sound tears through their mind.

Критический успех: The target takes no damage and is immune to Silent Yowl for 24 hours.

Успех: Цель получает половину урона.

Провал: Цель получает полный урон и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугана 1}.

Критический провал: The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

items.name: Slow Blink
items.description: The angoyang lets out a small meow and slowly blinks twice at a single creature. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:31] save. On a critical success, the target is unaffected and immune to Slow Blink for 24 hours. Otherwise, the creature is overcome with the urge to pet the angoyang's silken fur, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]. If the angoyang attacks the creature, the creature can attempt a new save at the beginning of their next turn.

Anugobu Apprentice.name: Anugobu Apprentice
Anugobu Apprentice.description:
Renowned in Tengah folklore as divinely gifted artisans and crafters, anugobus are a curious group of tiny humanoids native to the central islands of Minata. Countless stories describe anugobus sneaking around Minatan cities to tinker with and improve upon other humanoids' structures and architecture. Owing to their slight stature and relatively frail bodies, anugobus are said to be particularly shy of larger peoples and creatures. Whether under cover of darkness, during a festival that draws people away from their domiciles, or simply whenever they think they're unseen, anugobus in folklore perform their wondrous restorations and crafting projects in secret nearly without exception. Many popular Tengah stories feature homes ruined by a natural disaster that are then magically restored the next morning or unfinished projects like half-built bridges that are mysteriously completed while its workers wonder at how this was accomplished.

According to most legends, anugobus are unparalleled masters of architecture and engineering and use this expertise to erect complex structures or greatly improve upon already-existing buildings. Some have questioned these extraordinary stories, but anyone who witnesses an anugobu walk on the walls and ceilings of buildings while improving them knows that such tales aren't that far-fetched. In reality, anugobus are as diverse as any species of humanoid, though they all possess innate gifts for mending and construction, and they can walk on walls and ceilings. Anugobus resemble exceptionally small humans with superficial similarities to Tian-Sings. Most anugobus stand no more than 2 feet tall and weigh about 30 pounds-a diminutive stature that allows them to move in and out of crevices and remain unnoticed by taller folks. Nearly all verifiable anugobu encounters have taken place on the isles of Minata.

In many anugobu cultures, each anugobu seeks an ultimate life goal, which they call their wonder. A wonder is any particular project that enraptures an anugobu in a way no other will. Any project can be an anugobu's wonder, from repairing a majestic cathedral to hunting a particularly dangerous animal to exploring a mysterious cave. When an anugobu discovers their wonder, it's not uncommon for them to fall into an awestruck trance and commit themselves fully to completing the work, sometimes binging on the project for days or weeks at a time. When an anugobu finishes the last minute details on their wonder, their life's work is considered complete, and they spend the rest of their days aiding other anugobus with their own journeys or taking on apprentices to pass on their skills.

Most young anugobus undertake not just one, but many apprenticeships in order to learn advanced techniques in their trade of choice. The apprentice depicted here specializes in construction and engineering, but an anugobu is just as likely to take up cooking, hunting, tailoring, or really anything that piques their interest.

items.name: Инструменты ремесленника
items.description: Вам нужны эти инструменты, чтобы создавать предметы из исходных материалов с помощью навыка Ремесло. На усмотрение Мастера, различные наборы инструментов необходимы для разной работы; например, инструменты кузнеца отличаются от инструментов плотника.

items.name: Planar Workshop
items.description: An anugobu is intrinsically connected to small, pocket dimension that they typically refer to as their workshop. The workshop is an extradimensional 10-foot cube. The workshop holds an anugobu's collected tools and materials. An anugobu can enter or leave their planar workshop as an action, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits. The anugobu gains resistance 5 to all damage (except force) and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} while within the workshop. The workshop is only visible while the anugobu is inside it.

items.name: Каменный шаг
items.description: An anugobu can effortlessly stick to any worked or manufactured surface, allowing them to walk up walls and stand on ceilings.

items.name: Инструменты ремесленника [Безупречные]
items.description:
Вам нужны эти инструменты, чтобы создавать предметы из исходных материалов с помощью навыка Ремесло. Безупречные инструменты ремесленника дают бонус предмета +1 к проверке навыка.

На усмотрение Мастера, различные наборы инструментов необходимы для разной работы; например, инструменты кузнеца отличаются от инструментов плотника.

items.description: An anugobu can effortlessly stick to any worked or manufactured surface, allowing them to walk up walls and stand on ceilings.

items.name: Pinning Shot
items.description: The archery specialist makes a longbow Strike. If the attack hits, it deals no damage and instead imparts the bow critical specialization effect. If the attack is a critical hit, the target must succeed at two separate Interact actions to pull the missile free.

items.name: Point-Blank Shot
items.description: The archery specialist ignores the penalty to their attack rolls from the volley trait

items.name: Дождь стрел
items.description: The archery specialist fires several arrows at once, each aimed to land in a @Template[burst|distance:10] within 60 feet. The archery specialist makes a longbow Strike and compares the attack roll result to the AC of all creatures in the burst. The specialist rolls damage only once and applies it to each creature hit. Rain of Arrows counts as three attacks for the archery specialist's multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Отлично разящие морозные повязки могучих ударов +2
items.description:
Когда вы инвестируете эти расшитые полоски ткани, то должны медитировать и медленно обматывать их вокруг ваших рук. Эти обмотки имеют гравированные на них оружейные руны, чтобы давать вашим безоружным атакам преимущества этих рун, что делает ваши безоружные атаки похожими на магическое оружие. Например, разящие повязки могучих ударов +1 дают вам бонус предмета +1 к броскам на атаку с ними и увеличивают урон от безоружных атак с одной кости урона до двух (обычно 2d4 вместо 1d4, но если у ваших кулаков другой размер кости урона или у вас есть другие безоружные атаки, то используйте их кости урона).

Вы можете улучшать, добавлять и переносить руны с повязок и на повязки, как с обычным оружием, а так же можете прикреплять к повязкам талисманы. Для этих целей считайте повязки как оружие ближнего боя из группы "драка" с лёгкой Массой. Руны свойств применяются только когда они могут быть применимы к используемыми вами безоружными атаками. Например, свойство, которое должно применять к рубящему оружию не будет функционировать когда вы атакуете кулаками, но вы получите эти преимущества если атакуете когтями или другой рубящей безоружной атакой.

items.name: Bracers of Armor II
items.description: These stiff leather armguards grant you a +2 item bonus to AC and saving throws, and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5. You can affix talismans to bracers of armor as though they were light armor.

items.name: Breath of the Glacier
items.description:
The monk lets loose a powerful breath of air, whose effect depends on the type of energy to which the monk is attuned. The monk can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath of the Glacier]]{1d4 rounds}.

Pravan blows icy winds in a @Template[cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[10d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:33|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save as ice forms around them. The Speed penalty or immobilized condition caused by this ability persist until a creature either Breaks Open the ice or Escapes (DC 37 in either case), or if the creature takes at least 30 fire damage.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature takes half damage and takes a -5- foot status penalty to its Speeds.

Провал: The creature takes full damage and takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds.

Критический провал: The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe].

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The monk makes two Strikes with his fist or with a monk weapon. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: +2 Greater Striking Corrosive Handwraps of Mighty Blows

items.name: Breath of the Volcano
items.description:
The monk lets loose a powerful breath of air, whose effect depends on the type of energy to which the monk is attuned. The monk can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath of the Volcano]]{1d4 rounds}.

Usvani exhales a miasma of acidic fumes in a @Template[emanation|distance:15]. A creature that starts its turn in the area takes @Damage[12d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage- and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:33|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает половину урона и испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 1}.

Провал: Существо получает полный урон и испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}.

Критический провал: Существо получает двойной урон и испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 3}.

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The monk makes two Strikes with his fist or with a monk weapon. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Кислотная склянка [Большая, насыщенная]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Этот бутылек наполнен едкой кислотой, наносящей 1 кислотного урона, 3d6 продолжительного урона кислотой и 3 урона кислотными брызгами. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Алхимический огонь [Большой, насыщенный]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Алхимический огонь это комбинация горючих жидкостей, которые загораются при контакте с воздухом. Алхимический огонь наносит 3d8 урона огнём, 3 продолжительного урона огнём и 3 урона огненными брызгами. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Молния в бутылке [Большая, насыщенная]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Молния в бутылке наполнена летучими реагентами, которые создают взрыв электричества, когда реагируют с воздухом. Она наносит 3d6 урона электричеством и 3 урона электрическими брызгами. При попадании цель становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнутой врасплох} до начала вашего следующего хода. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

items.name: Морозная склянка [Большая, насыщенная]
items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Жидкие реагенты внутри этого бутылька быстро поглощают тепло при контакте с воздухом. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки. Морозная склянка наносит 3d6 урона холодом и 3 урона холодом от брызг. При попадании цель получает штраф состояния −10 футов к своим Скоростям до конца своего следующего хода.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]

items.name: Dragon Bile (Applied to Body)
items.description:
Смесь пищеварительных соков и ядовитых желез зеленого дракона вызывает у жертвы тошноту, поскольку ее плоть переваривается изнутри.

Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F] (@Trait[Contact]{контакт})

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

Возникновение: 1 минута

Бомба-липучка наполнена клейкой субстанцией. Когда вы попадаете липучкой по существу, оно получает штраф состояния −20 футов к своим Скоростям на 1 минуту. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

При критическом попадании существо, находящееся в контакте с твёрдой поверхностью, приклеивается к ней и становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Обездвижено} на 1 раунд, а у существ, летающих при помощи крыльев, крылья запутываются, из-за чего они безопасно приземляются на землю и неспособны снова "Лететь" 1 раунд. Бомба-липучка неэффективна для использования против существ в воде.

Цель может закончить любые эффекты, [[/act escape dc=37]]{Вырвавшись} или потратив в общей сложности 3 действия @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F], чтобы аккуратно убрать клейкую субстанцию. Эти действия "Взаимодействовать" не обязаны быть последовательными, а другие существа также могут помочь своими "Взаимодействиями".

Many types of thunderstone grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls. The bomb deals 4d4 sonic damage and 4 sonic splash damage, and the DC is 36.

items.description:
Смесь пищеварительных соков и ядовитых желез зеленого дракона вызывает у жертвы тошноту, поскольку ее плоть переваривается изнутри.

Broken Rebus Attack.name: Broken Rebus Attack
Broken Rebus Attack.disable: @Check[religion|dc:34|name:Say an Iroran prayer|traits:haunt] (expert) to say an Iroran prayer and put the haunt temporarily to rest, @Check[occultism|dc:38|name:Ward Against Future Hauntings|traits:haunt] (master) to create a ward against future hauntings.
Broken Rebus Attack.reset: The haunt deactivates after 1 minute. It re-forms at the same times every day, 7 a.m. and 7 p.m., which is when the monks had their morning and evening meals. If at least two people cook a meal in the kitchen, share a meal in the refectory, and utter a prayer to Irori before the meal, the haunt becomes permanently disabled and doesn't re-form.
Broken Rebus Attack.routine: (1 action) The haunt sends a flurry of objects hurtling across the room. All creatures in the room are battered by the ghostly objects, taking @Damage[(3d10+14)[force]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] save).
Broken Rebus Attack.Hdescription: Ghostly attackers knock the tables about, send dishes flying, and pull fleeing creatures into the room.

Bul-Gae.name: Bul-Gae
Bul-Gae.description:
Bul-gaes are manifestations of the eclipsed sun and moon. They resemble large canines, though their coloration and features change as they exercise their powers over heat and cold. Depending on whether they have most recently unleashed their lunar or solar powers, a bul-gae resembles either a crimson hound wreathed in flames or a cerulean, frostbitten fox, respectively.

Legends say that the first bul-gae attempted to steal the sun from the sky. As they bit down on the burning sphere, though, the bul-gae was badly burned. Having failed, they then tried to retrieve the moon, but when they touched the moon the bul-gae froze solid and fell to the ground. The descendants of that bul-gae forever hone their powers of flame and ice so that they may one day succeed where their ancestor failed.

items.name: Butterfly's Kiss
items.description: The warrior can make nonlethal Strikes with a butterfly sword without taking a penalty.

items.name: Mastermind's Eye
items.description: When the warrior successfully identifies a creature using Recall Knowledge, that creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against their attacks until the start of its next turn; if they critically succeed, it's off-guard against their attacks for 1 minute.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The warrior's Strikes deal an additional 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Studied Strike
items.description: The warrior makes a telegraphed attack to learn about their foe. They make a melee Strike. On a hit, they can immediately attempt a check to Recall Knowledge about the target. On a critical hit, they gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the check to Recall Knowledge. The target is then temporarily immune to Studied Strike for 1 day.

Canopy Elder.name: Старейшина полога(*)
Canopy Elder.description:
В самых густых и древних джунглях дендроиды могут достигать высоты 200 футов и более. Прожив тысячи лет без тревог, эти массивные существа вступают в симбиотические отношения с огромным количеством растений, грибов и животных, чтобы достичь почетного статуса старейшины полога. Они обеспечивают безопасный дом для существ, которых принимают, и развивают различные способности, помогающие им защищать свои лесные владения.

Дендроиды - хранители леса и представители деревьев. Такие же долгожители, как и леса, которые они охраняют, дендроиды считают себя родителями и пастырями деревьев, а не их садовниками. Поэтому, хотя дендроиды, как правило медлительны и методичны, они ужасающе быстры, когда им приходится сражаться, защищая лес. Хотя дендроиды редко ищут общения с недолговечными народами - даже эльфы в глазах дендроидов выглядят мимолетными - и с присущим им недоверием относятся к переменам, они терпимо относятся к тем, кто стремится учиться у них, читая длинные и бессвязные монологи, особенно если такие ученики также выражают желание защищать лесные земли. Против тех, кто угрожает их царству, например лесорубов, желающих заготовить древесину, или поселенцев, стремящихся заложить пашни или город, дендроиды гневаются непоколебимо и разрушительно. Возможно, по иронии судьбы, дендроиды умеют разрушать то, что строят другие - эта черта хорошо помогает мстительным представителям их рода.
Canopy Elder.language: разговор с животными, разговор с растениями

items.name: Разговор с животными (Постоянное)
items.description: Вы можете задавать вопросы, получать ответы и использовать навык Дипломатии с животными. Заклинание не делает их более дружелюбными чем обычно. Хитрые животные, скорее всего, будут немногословны и уклончивы, в то время как менее умные часто делают бессмысленные комментарии.

items.name: Разговор с растениями (Постоянное)
items.description:
Вы можете задавать вопросы и получать ответы от растений и грибков, но заклинание не делает их дружелюбнее или умнее, чем обычно. Большинство нормальных растений имеют особый взгляд на окружающий мир, поэтому они не распознают детали о существах или знают что-либо о мире за пределами их непосредственной окрестности. Хитрые растительные монстры, скорее всего, будут немногословны и уклончивы, в то время как менее умные часто говорят что-то бессмысленное.

Усиление (4-й): Продолжительность увеличивается до 8 часов.

items.name: Слабость к топорам
items.description: Старейшина полога получает дополнительные 15 урона от топоров.

items.name: Заращивание лозами
items.description: Старейшина полога выращивает сетку лоз вокруг своих сломанных ветвей, восстанавливая урон и возвращая себе [[/r 40[healing]]] ОЗ. Старейниша полога не может использовать "Заращивание лозами" снова в течение [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Vine Splint]]{1d4 раундов}.

items.name: Грибная паутина
items.description: Старейшина полога запускает быстро растущую паутину из грибов, растущих на его теле, в одно существо в радиусе 80 футов. Цель должна совершить спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:39]{Рефлекса}, иначе окажется @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] грибной паутиной ([[/act escape dc=39]]). Пока существо `сдерживаемо`, оно также получает @Damage[4d6[poison]] в конце каждого своего хода.

items.name: Облако пыльцы
items.description: Старейшина полога выпускает плотное облако пыльцы из эпифитов, живущих на его ветвях. Облако исходит от старейшины полога @Template[emanation|distance:40]. Облако не перемещается вместе со старейшиной полога и остается на месте в течение [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 раундов}, после чего рассеивается. Существа внутри облака становятся @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W], а все существа вне облака становятся @Condition[Concealed]{скрыты} для существ внутри него. Не-растительные и не-грибковые существа, находящиеся в облаке, должны совершить спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:38]{Стойкости}. При провале существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнит 3}, а при критическом провале оно также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Слепо} на 1 минуту. Независимо от результата, существо временно иммунно к эффектам @Condition[Sickened]{тошноты} и @Condition[Blinded]{слепоты} от пыльцы старейшины полога на 24 часа.

Canopy Elder.CdescriptionGM:
Срубленные дендроиды

Дендроиды с большим уважением относятся к погибшим представителям своего вида. Их сложные ритуалы погребения включают в себя укладывание павшего дендроида на моховую подстилку в центре рощи саженцев. Разлагающийся дендроид питает саженцы, обеспечивая рост нового поколения деревьев.

Грибковая сеть

Особо старые дендроиды регенты и другие могущественные дендроиды могут подключаться к обширной грибковой сети, соединяющей корни всех деревьев в лесу. Благодаря этому дендроид может узнавать об угрозах по всему лесу, даже находясь за много миль от него.

Позднецветущие

Хотя дендроиды растут быстрее деревьев, им требуются десятилетия, чтобы достичь зрелости. Первые годы они проводят укоренившись на месте, развивая сродство с флорой своей родины и подстраиваясь под ее ритмы, в то время как взрослые дендроиды внимательно следят за их развитием. После первого столетия молодые дендроиды становятся более подвижными, часто подрабатывают у старших дендроидов на своей территории, принимая мантию хранителя леса.

Caustic Monitor.name: Caustic Monitor
Caustic Monitor.description:
Caustic monitors are enormous lizards native to eastern Minata known and named for the corrosive enzyme in their mucus, saliva, and other bodily fluids. These corrosive fluids originally developed as a means of protection from large insects such as giant mosquitos. The thick layer of mucus that naturally coats the monitors' scaly skin makes it difficult for most other creatures to get too close, let alone prey upon the lizard.

Caustic monitors also use their corrosive biological features to their hunting advantage, particularly by expelling the acidic contents of their stomach at prey. Even when not making use of their acid, caustic monitors can be deadly predators: They grab onto smaller creatures using their powerful forelimb muscles and are remarkably agile, considering their size and weight.

Most caustic monitors live among rocky terrain such as pebble beaches, natural caves, and along sandy river shoals. A caustic monitor's mucus corrodes only flesh, so its den is safe from damage, but corroded plant life near a cave is a telltale sign that a caustic monitor lives nearby. Hardy adventurers and fortune seekers must weigh the potential benefits of hunting this beast -as its acid is highly prized among alchemists-against the obvious risks.

items.name: Caustic Monitor Venom
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[4d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблен 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[4d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблен 2} (1 раунд)

items.name: Caustic Spray
items.description: The caustic monitor spits a spray of corrosive bile that deals @Damage[5d8[acid]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:20] (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic|options:area-effect] save). It can't use Caustic Spray again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Caustic Spray]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Corrosive Flesh
items.description: A creature that touches the caustic monitor takes @Damage[2d8[acid]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:32|basic|traits:acid] save).

items.name: Скрежещущая хватка
items.description:
Триггер: A creature grabbed by the caustic monitor's jaws fails a check to Escape.

Эффект: The caustic monitor's jaws deal @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage and the triggering creature is exposed to caustic monitor venom.

items.name: Стремительное нападение
items.description: The caustic monitor Strides twice, then makes a jaws Strike. If the monitor moved at least 20 feet away from its starting position, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to this attack roll.

Cloudsplitter.name: Cloudsplitter
Cloudsplitter.allSaves: -1 status penalty to all saves vs. death effects

items.name: штраф состояния −1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти
Deflecting Gale
items.description:
Триггер: The kirin is targeted with a ranged Strike

Эффект: The kirin intensifies the wind around themself, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

items.name: Peaceful Aura
items.description:
60 feet. Creatures within Cloudsplitter's peaceful aura attempting to use a hostile action must first attempt a @Check[will|dc:39] save; on a failure, the hostile action is disrupted.

If a creature in the aura successfully uses a hostile action, it's temporarily immune to peaceful aura for 24 hours, and while it's temporarily immune, other creatures in the Cloudsplitter's peaceful aura can perform hostile actions toward it without needing to attempt a Will save.

Cloudsplitter can select creatures within their aura that can use hostile actions without needing to attempt a Will save.

Cloudsplitter allows anyone involved in the player character's bout with Jin-Hae to use hostile actions without a Will save.

items.name: Susceptible to Death
items.description:
Though phantoms aren't alive, neither are they undead, and they are uniquely vulnerable to the effects of death.

A phantom whose Hit Points are reduced to 0 as a result of a death effect (such as from a spell like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]) is immediately whisked away to the River of Souls, where their soul resumes the usual path to the afterlife.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description: Cloudsplitter breathes fire in a @Template[cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). Cloudsplitter can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Rearing Thrust
items.description: The Cloudsplitter rushes forward, rears up on their hind legs, and descends upon their target with their horn. Cloudsplitter Strides and makes a horn Strike. If this Strike hits, it deals an additional 2d8 damage, and the target is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Растоптать
items.description:
Средний или менее, фантомное копыто, простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]{Рефлекса}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Collapsing Structure.name: Разрушающееся строение
Collapsing Structure.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:43|name:Brace the Structure] (master), @Check[crafting|dc:43|name:Brace the Structure] (master), or @Check[engineering-lore|dc:43|name:Brace the Structure]{Engineering Lore} (master) to brace the structure to reduce the risk of collapse until the end of the creature's next turn. The DC of the flat check for this round (see Routine) is increased by 4 on a success, or by 8 on a critical success. Increasing the flat check DC to 21 or higher stabilizes the structure, ending this hazard.
Collapsing Structure.reset: The building becomes susceptible to Shake Apart again [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} after it is stabilized.
Collapsing Structure.routine: (1 action) The GM rolls a @Check[flat|dc:9] to determine if the building collapses, increasing the DC as listed above. On a successful check, dust and debris fall within the building and 30 feet around it, providing @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} and dealing @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] damage to [[/gmr 1d4 #targets]] randomly chosen targets (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save; on a critically failed save, the creature is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]). On a critical success, the effect is the same, but the debris deals @Damage[12d6[bludgeoning]] damage to [[/gmr 2d4 #targets]] randomly chosen targets instead (DC 35 basic Reflex save; on a critically failed Reflex save, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] by rubble until freed [[[/act force-open dc=38]], [[/act escape dc=35]]]).
Collapsing Structure.stealth: +20 (master) to notice cracks forming in the walls of the structure as Mogaru approaches
Collapsing Structure.Hdescription: Mogaru brushes against a structure, severely compromising the building's stability and possibly causing it to collapse.

items.name: Riotous Parade
items.description:
60 feet. The night parade sweeps up those nearby in a riotous celebration. All creatures in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:39|traits:auditory,aura,emotion,enchantment,mental] save. The target is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Критический успех: The target is unafflicted.

Успех: The target laughs and dances. It can't use reactions as long as it stays in the area, and if it attempts to use a concentrate action, it must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] check; on a failure, the action is lost.

Провал: As success, except the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while in the area.

Критический провал: As success, except the target is also slowed 1 while in the area and the flat check DC is 10.

items.name: Передвижение отряда
items.description: Когда отряд @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Перемещается}, он в начале @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.OvqohW9YuahnFaiX]{Строится} свободным действием (F) в область 20 на 20 футов (за вычетом любых недостающих квадратов), потом двигается вплоть до своей Скорости. Это работает так же как передвижение Исполинских существ; например, если любой из квадратов отряда попадает в сложную местность, то дополнительная стоимость передвижения применяется ко всему отряду.

items.name: Защита отряда
items.description:
Пороги: 300 (3 сегмента), 150 (2 сегмента)

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.TroopDefenses]

items.name: Seiya! Soiya!
items.description: The night parade shouts a series of energetic call-and-responses, dealing @Damage[3d10[sonic],4d6[mental]|options:area-damage]{3d10 sonic damage and 4d6 mental damage} to all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10] within 20 feet (@Check[will|dc:41|basic|options:area-effect] save). If the troop is reduced to 8 or fewer squares, this area decreases to a @Template[burst|distance:5].

items.name: Wasshoi! Wasshoi!
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The night parade dances with wild abandon, unintentionally striking nearby creatures. It deals damage to each adjacent creature (@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic] save), and any creature that fails its save is pushed 10 feet in any direction as the night parade bounces it overhead. The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(1d10+7)[bludgeoning]] damage

2 @Damage[(4d10+14)[bludgeoning]] damage

3 @Damage[(6d10+14)[bludgeoning]] damage

Desecrated Guardian.name: Desecrated Guardian
Desecrated Guardian.description: Countless temples across Golarion, dedicated to deities both living and forgotten, have risen and fallen through the ages. Many find themselves buried under sand, snow, or vine never to be found. In such places, the spirits of the faithful can bind with their ruined temple to form a guardian construct, though with nothing left to guard, these spirits often become hollow, resentful, and filled with malice. These "desecrated guardians" lie in wait, sometimes for centuries, and destroy any adventurers who happen upon them. The most powerful desecrated guardians, such as the one presented here, incorporate the structures of multiple temples into their massive serpentine forms.

items.name: Desecration Aura
items.description: 40 feet. Desecrated guardians exude a palpable malice that nauseates all but the most wicked passersby. Non-evil creatures that enter the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:37] save. On a failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). In addition, any non-evil creatures that attempt to Cast a Spell within the aura must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] check or the spell is lost.

items.name: Rebuild
items.description: The desecrated guardian draws in rubble from the surrounding area to rebuild its damaged body. It recovers @Damage[8d6[healing]] Hit Points. It can only use this ability if it is near suitable rock or rubble.

items.name: Лавина
items.description: The desecrated guardian thrashes its body about, causing the nearby terrain to crumble and crash down on creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:60], dealing @Damage[12d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save). It can't use Avalanche again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Avalanche]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Coiled Rockslide
items.description: If the desecrated guardian started its turn hidden, it can Trample and remain hidden until after its attacks.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(2d8+18)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:39|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.description:
Huge, @Damage[(3d8+20)[bludgeoning]] damage, Rupture 45

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.description:
Огромный или меньше, хвост, простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic]{Рефлекса}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Dimensional Darkside Mirror.name: Dimensional Darkside Mirror
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.descriptionHazard:
A magic mirror replaces characters with evil mirror duplicates from another dimension.

The mirror can't be damaged while any mirror duplicate is alive
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:40|name:Retrieve a Creature] (legendary) to retrieve a creature from the other dimension within 10 minutes of the switch (possible only if their mirror duplicate is dead), @Check[thievery|dc:45|name:Disable the Mirror] (master) to permanently disable the mirror once all mirror duplicates are dead, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (8th rank; counteract DC 37) to counteract the mirror for 1 minute and prevent additional replacements during that time
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.reset: The mirror is always ready to absorb creatures into the other dimension. Ten minutes after a creature is sucked into the mirror, if an ally doesn't rescue the creature with Thievery, it reaches the other dimension, where it might be captured or killed. In the mirror dimension, it counts as a mirror duplicate, so the denizens of the other dimension can't destroy the mirror on their side while the absorbed creature is there. These dimensions are alternate realities, not planes, so even rituals like plane shift can't reach them.
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.routine: (1 action) The mirror absorbs another reflected creature into the mirror and replaces it with a mirror duplicate. Mirror duplicates attack on their own initiative, using the same statistics as the original creature, but with an evil alignment (changing only abilities that shift with the alignment change). A mirror duplicate can spend 3 actions in contact with the mirror to return to its original dimension and release the creature it duplicated, but most mirror duplicates prefer not to.
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.stealth: +37 (master) to notice it isn't a regular mirror
Dimensional Darkside Mirror.Hdescription: A magic mirror replaces characters with evil mirror duplicates from another dimension.

items.description:
Tail only. On a critical hit, the target is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]; if the target was using a move action, its movement ends.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Battle Dance
items.description: The drake courser makes two fangs Strikes and one tail Strike in any order. It can replace any of these Strikes with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB].

items.name: Buffeting Surge
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Эффект: The drake courser moves up to twice its Speed. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP] with its tail once at any point during its movement.

items.name: Выдох морозного тумана
items.description: The drake spits a ball of liquid up to 60 feet that explodes into a @Template[burst|distance:20] of freezing mist. Those in the burst take @Damage[13d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:31|basic|options:area-effect] save). The mist cakes all surfaces in the area with a sheet of slippery ice that turns the area into difficult terrain for [[/br 2d4 #rounds]]{2d4 rounds}. It can't use Freezing Mist Breath again for [[/gmr 1d6 #Recharge Freezing Mist Breath]]{1d6 rounds}.

items.name: Ice Climb (35 feet)
items.description: A drake courser can climb on ice as though it had the listed climb Speed. It ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and doesn't risk falling when crossing ice.

Dread Roc.name: Dread Roc
Dread Roc.description:
Legendarily massive raptors capable of carrying off elephants as prey, rocs are typically about 30 feet long from beak to tail and have a wingspan of 80 feet or more. While their beaks are hooked to rip flesh from bone, their hunting strategy involves grabbing their prey in their powerful talons and then dropping it from great heights before feeding. This method creates a massive amount of carrion, which guarantees that rocs are followed by flocks of opportunistic scavengers, such as ravens and buzzards, who find it easy to steal bits of the larger birds' meals. Rocs, for the most part, don't mind these creatures, which sometimes get gobbled up along with the rest of the roc's food.

Rocs usually nest among mountaintops and cliffs inaccessible to all but the bravest of terrestrial dwellers. They are long-range predators that hunt both land and sea in search for massive prey to sustain them and their young. Rocs are antisocial and lone hunters who compete with each other in fierce aerial battles to protect territory. But about once a decade, a mating couple pairs up to raise their chicks. Once the chicks are old enough to hunt on their own, the parents separate to once again engage in lone hunting.

Particularly skilled druids or rangers might capture and train a roc to serve as a flying mount or hunting companion, though examples of such an incredible feat of domestication are few and far between. The easiest way to rear a roc is to do so from the moment it hatches, since the chick imprints on the first creature it sees. Acquiring a roc egg is by no means an easy feat, though, and is often a death sentence for the would-be egg-snatcher.

items.name: Отпор крылом
items.description:
Триггер: Существо передвигается из-за пределов досягаемости крыла руха в досягаемость его крыла.

Эффект: Рух совершает "Удар" крылом по спровоцировавшему существу. Если рух @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.t6cx9FOODmeZQNYl]{Толкает} это существо, то прерывает спровоцировавшее действие @Trait[Move]{движения}.

items.name: Dreadful Screech
items.description:
The dread roc screeches terrifyingly. Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:120] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened,inflicts:fleeing] save. Regardless of the result, creatures are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 1}.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 2}.

Критический провал: Существо впадает в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Бегство} на 1 раунд и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 3}.

items.name: Удары в полёте
items.description: Рух @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Летит} вплоть до своей Скорости и в любой момент этого передвижения наносит 2 "Удара" когтями. Каждый "Удар" должен целиться в разных существ. Эти атаки получают и применяют штраф множественных атак как обычно.

items.name: Закуска
items.description: Если цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Схвачена} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Сдерживается} когтями руха, то он получает бонус обстоятельства +2 к "Удару" клювом по этой цели.

items.name: Рывок
items.description: Когда у руха в одном или обоих когтях есть @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Схваченное} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Сдерживаемое} существо, он может @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Лететь} с ним с половиной Скорости.

items.name: Improved Push 15ft
items.description:
Требования: The monster's last action was a success with a Strike that lists Push in its damage entry.

Эффект: The monster automatically knocks the target away from the monster. Unless otherwise noted in the ability description, the creature is pushed 15 feet. If the attack was a critical hit, this distance is doubled.

Dromornis.name: Dromornis
Dromornis.description:
Dromornises are large, flightless, carnivorous birds that travel in packs to ambush prey. Their short, stubby wings may give them a comical appearance, but anyone who's been on the receiving end of the beast's powerful beak finds the experience less than amusing. Dromornis use their beaks to easily tear flesh and sinew from prey's bones, quickly dispatching sizable mammals like deer, tapirs, and primates. Particularly hungry or aggressive dromornises have even been known to attack humanoids. The bird's strong legs sport sharp talons that, while secondary in combat to its beak, can nonetheless trample and shred smaller creatures like rodents and amphibians caught underfoot.

While a lone dromornis is dangerous enough, a pack of dromornises can take down a den of bears or village of humanoids. A dromornis pack typically consists of three or four adults and up to five juveniles, all of whom work in tandem to overpower larger prey. Packs lie in wait for something like an anaconda, boar, buffalo or, in cases of desperation, a dinosaur to emerge, then move as one for a surprise strike. Dromornises aren't particularly intelligent, but they have been known to use an ingenious (if hazardous) decoy tactic, luring in massive prey by putting one of their own fledglings at risk.

Dromornises most often live in tropical jungles far from the reaches of civilization, though they sometimes make their homes in mountainside caves or along rocky coastlines. While most onlookers would be hard-pressed to tell one dromornis from another, dromornises maintain tight familial structures based on pheromones and scent glands, so it's obvious when a straggler from another family is trying to encroach on a pack's den. Such disputes over breeding grounds are common; a particularly prized dromornis den might change hands several times in the course of a year. Fights between dromornis packs are chaotic and swift, marked with the sounds of terrifying screeches and sprays of blood.

items.name: Pack Ambush
items.description:
Триггер: Another dromornis within 10 feet Strides.

Эффект: The dromornis Strides up to half its Speed.

items.name: Нападение стаей
items.description: Dromornises fight best while among their fellows. A dromornis deals 1d8 extra damage to any creature that's within reach of at least two of the dromornis's allies.

items.name: Rushing Attack
items.description: The dromornis suddenly Strides and makes a Strike at the end of its movement. During the Stride, it gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed.

items.name: Растоптать
items.description:
Средний или меньше, коготь, простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:26|basic]{Рефлекса}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Elder Cauthooj.name: Старый каутуй
Elder Cauthooj.description:
Эти крупные, нелетающие птицы обманчиво проворны, учитывая их длинное тело и неуклюжую прыгающую походку. Одиночные хищники, они используют свою гипнотическую воющую песню, чтобы довести добычу до дикого бешенства, заставляя ее нападать друг на друга, чтобы потом каутуй мог полакомиться останками.

Известные одним ученым как птица-кукловод, а другим как пронзительный крикун, каутуи широко почитаются большинством разумных гуманоидов, отчасти потому, что похоже они предпочитают гуманоидов в качестве добычи. При встрече с ними обычно создаются охотничьи отряды, чтобы выследить существо до того, как оно сможет убить снова, причем потенциальные охотники обычно закладывают уши воском, чтобы избежать воздействия его крика. Те, кому удалось пережить песню этого существа, говорят, что это необычайно нервирует их, и почти все рассказы сходятся на том, что нет другого такого ужасного звука.

Хотя можно подумать, что каутуй — не обладающее разумом животное, эти существа умнее чем кажутся. Каутуй бродят по периметру, отдаленных поселений в надежде найти одинокого путника, которым они могут полакомиться. Эти терпеливые существа готовы сидеть в засаде столько, сколько потребуется, чтобы потом утолить свой голод. Они даже понимают несколько элементарных слов на фейском, хотя сами не способны говорить внятно. Это не мешает каутую пытаться подражать звукам, которые он слышит, но когда он это делает, его жуткая природная натура усиливает эту попытку, что приводит к фирменной способности птицы манипулировать разумами и провоцировать конфликты — черта, которую каутуй едва ли достаточно умен, чтобы понять и насладиться ею.
Elder Cauthooj.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Мыслечувствительность (неточное) 60 футов
items.description: Каутуй чувствует ментальную сущность существ на указанном расстоянии.

items.name: Подскок с уворотом
items.description:
Триггер: Каутуй является целью "Удара" ближнего боя и находится рядом с другим врагом в досягаемости этого "Удар"

Эффект: Каутуй ловко отскакивает в сторону, перенаправляя спровоцировавший "Удар" на соседнего врага. Каутуй @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Перемещается} вплоть до половины Скорости, и это движение не провоцирует реакции.

items.name: Удар стаккато
items.description: Тонко изменяя высоту и тон своей песни, каутуй направляет одно существо в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве} своей "Трелью", чтобы оно нанесло "Удар". Этот "Удар" действует так же, как и другие "Удары", наносимые существами в @Condition[Confused]{замешательстве}, за исключением того, что каутуй выбирает цель. Если в досягаемости или дальности нет целей, или существо не может нанести "Удар" по какой-либо другой причине, эта способность не действует.

items.name: Трель
items.description:
Каутуй издает странный, воющий крик, который заставляет близлежащих существ неистово и бесконтрольно биться. Каждое существо в @Template[emanation|distance:120]{120-футовой эманации}, которое может слышать каутуя, должно совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:34]{Воли}, чтобы противостоять эффекту.

Критический успех: Цель невредима и временно иммунна на 1 минуту.

Успех: Цель невредима.

Провал: Цель в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве} на 1 раунд.

Критический провал: Цель в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве} на 1 раунд и мгновенно атакует себя (как обычная атака себя @Condition[Confused]{в замешательстве}). Этот "Удар" не даёт существу чистую проверку, чтобы восстановиться от @Condition[Confused]{замешательства}.

Floating Flamethrower.name: Floating Flamethrower
Floating Flamethrower.disable: three @Check[thievery|dc:40|name:Disable an Elemental Core|traits:action:disable-a-device,hazard,magical,trap,fire] (legendary) checks or castings of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th level; counteract DC 40), one each to pull out or disable the elemental cores hidden in the floating skull's right eye, left eye, and mouth
Floating Flamethrower.routine: (3 actions) The trap loses 1 action per turn per successful check to disable. The floating flamethrower uses its first action to release a gout of flame in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[(4d6+4)[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save), its second action to fly in a U-shape in a random direction, and its third action to release another gout of flame.
Floating Flamethrower.stealth: +23 (expert) or @Check[perception|dc:38|traits:action:seek] (master) to notice the pattern of the orb's trajectory
Floating Flamethrower.Hdescription: A floating skull of fire swoops around the arena, rotating as it weaves through the ring and releasing huge gouts of flame in random directions.

items.name: Штормовой полёт
items.description: Каминари может легко передвигаться при ветре. Он игнорирует всю сложную местность от ветра и не нуждается в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{Маневрировании в полёте} при сильном ветре.

items.name: Штормовое зрение
items.description: Ветер, осадки и облака не мешают зрению каминари; он игнорирует состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Скрыт}, вызванное штормом, туманом, осадками и тому подобным.

items.name: Hurricane Bag
items.description:
A kaminari's bag holds the four winds. The kaminari unleashes four @Template[burst|distance:20]s within 60 feet with the effects of a 9th-rank wall of wind. In addition, a creature that enters one of the bursts takes @Damage[6d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). The bursts can't overlap. After using this activity the kaminari can't use Hurricane Bag for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hurricane Bag]]{1d4 rounds}.

If a kaminari creates a column of lighting using Thunder Drums that intersects one of the areas of the wind, the wind explodes in a peal of thunder, dealing @Damage[6d10[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in the area of that wall of wind burst. Affected creatures must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save. The kaminari can detonate only one burst per use of Thunder Drums.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target takes half damage. Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR] for 1 minute.

Критический провал: The target takes double damage and is deafened permanently.

items.name: Tempest Tether
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Electricity leaps between two kaminari. The kaminari establishes a connection with another kaminari within 150 feet, and lightning and thunder form a line between the centers of their spaces. For the next minute, a creature that begins its turn in the line or enters the line on its turn takes @Damage[4d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). A creature can take this damage only once per round, even if it moves through several tempest tethers. If the distance between the kaminari ever exceeds 150 feet, the tether breaks.

items.name: Thunder Drums
items.description:
The peal of a kaminari's drums bring thunder and lightning. The kaminari summons four 100-foot-tall columns of lightning to strike in @Template[burst|distance:5]s within 60 feet. These columns can't overlap. Creatures in the burst take @Damage[8d12[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:40|options:area-effect,damaging-effect,inflicts:stunned] save. The kaminari can't use Thunder Drums again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Thunder Drums]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Freezing Floor Tiles.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:40|name:Disable One Sensor|traits:action:disable-a-device] (legendary) or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (6th level; counteract DC 38) to disable one of the sensors
Freezing Floor Tiles.routine: (4 actions) The trap loses 1 action per disabled sensor. On each action, the trap causes a random 10-foot-by-10-foot space in the arena to suddenly freeze. Each creature that begins its turn in a frozen space takes @Damage[(2d6+2)[cold]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). items.name: Связь с местом
items.description: Типичное привидение может отдалиться лишь на небольшое расстояние от места, где оно было убито, или от места, которое он населяет. Типичное ограничение — 120 футов. Вместо этого, некоторые привидения привязаны не к месту, а к комнате, зданию, предмету или существу, которое было для них особенным.

items.name: Восстановление
items.description:
Putting the abbot in A8 to rest brings peace to the ghost monks, allowing them to move on to the Serene Circle in Axis.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The ghost monk makes two Strikes with their ghostly fist. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Пугающий стон
items.description: Привидение оплакивает свою судьбу, заставляя каждое живое существо в @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30-футовой эманации} совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:25|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}. При провале существо становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 2} (или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 3} при критическом провале). При успехе существо становится временно иммунно на 1 минуту к "Пугающему стону" этого привидения.

items.name: Телекинетическое нападение
items.description: Привидение выкрикивает от боли и страдания, и тотчас мелкие предметы и обломки разлетаются в @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30-футовой эманации}. Существа в этой области получают @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage], с простым спасброском @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса}.

items.name: Mantis Ambush
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within Grandfather Mantis's reach is hit by an ally's melee attack

Эффект: Grandfather Mantis makes a claw Strike against the triggering creature.

items.name: Наскок
items.description: Grandfather Mantis Strides, then Strikes.

Grave Spinosaurus.name: Grave Spinosaurus
Grave Spinosaurus.description:
The spinosaurus is more than just one of the largest carnivorous dinosaurs-it's also one of the most unusual in appearance, with a large, sail-like fin running along its spine. Often quite colorful, this sail allows the spinosaurus to attract mates, aids in swimming, and makes it appear to be even larger than it actually is. A swimming spinosaurus can also use the sail as part of a unique means of staggering prey by slapping the water with it to make a crushing wave.

The spinosaurus is equally at home in water as it is on land, and its long, toothy maw is well-adapted to catching swimming prey. Attempts by giants to capture spinosauruses to serve as guardians typically go poorly, for these headstrong dinosaurs do not domesticate well. Their surly attitudes and striking appearances make them better suited for bloodsports, and they are popular prizes for those who run arenas specializing in battles that pit gladiators against hungry animals or beasts. Of course, an angry dinosaur forced to fight for the amusement of others won't discriminate between potential meals on the battleground and ones seated in the surrounding stands.

The spinosaurus's appearance and strength make it attractive to more than just giants and bloodsport organizers. Spellcasters who mutate and transform animals into magical guardians have long been intrigued by the spinosaurus's potential. More so than any other dinosaurs, spinosauruses have been subjected to fleshwarping procedures, crossbreeding with monsters, and other magical techniques to enhance the creatures' viability as effective guardians.

A spinosaurus can measure up to 60 feet in length and weighs 25,000 pounds.

items.name: Глубокий вдох
items.description: The grave spinosaurus can hold its breath for 4 hours.

items.name: Pouncing Pin
items.description: The grave spinosaurus Strides and makes a Strike at the end of its movement. If the Strike hits, it deals damage as normal and the grave spinosaurus makes an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP] the target. This check counts toward the grave spinosaurus's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes the check.

items.name: Рвать и метать(*)
items.description:
Требования: The grave spinosaurus has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] in its jaws

Эффект: The grave spinosaurus reaches up and slashes with its claws at the creature it has grabbed, dealing @Damage[6d10[slashing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] save) and @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

items.name: Staggering Sail
items.description:
Требования: The grave spinosaurus is swimming on the surface of water

Эффект: With a powerful lunge to the side, the grave spinosaurus uses its sail to slap the surface of the water, creating a crushing wave of water that deals @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the water in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:36|options:area-effect,damaging-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:stunned] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает половину урона.

Провал: Существо получает полный урон и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлено 1} до конца своего следующего хода.

Критический провал: Существо получает двойной урон и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 3}.

items.description:
Medium,@Damage[(3d12+12)[bludgeoning]] damage, Rupture 36

Gumiho.name: Gumiho
Gumiho.description:
Gumihos are legendary nine-tailed fox creatures who, when disguised in humanoid form, use charm and guile to lure prey deep into the forest before revealing their true form and striking. The green-eyed canids use brutally sharp fangs to tear out their victim's throat and feast on their liver. Those few who survive a gumiho's trap recall the canid's eerie green eyes as well as a strange marble amulet warn around the monster's neck.

Old stories claim that a fox transforms into a gumiho once it has lived for a thousand years, quadrupling in size, growing eight additional tails, and gaining the power to change shape. Terrifyingly, it also gains an insatiable hunger for the livers of people. This hunger is so closely connected to a gumiho's power that if it abstains from eating liver for one thousand days, the gumiho loses its magic and permanently takes on its humanoid guise-also losing its evil nature in the process.

items.name: Guileful Charm
items.description:
Any creature that converses with a gumiho must attempt a @Check[will|dc:35] save. The creature then becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Критический успех: The target is unaffected but knows the gumiho tried to charm it.

Успех: Цель невредима.

Провал: The target is affected by the failure effects of 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6].

Критический провал: The target is affected by the failure effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P].

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The gumiho changes into humanoid or fox shape. Their humanoid shape has a specific, persistent appearance but their true form is their fox shape. In humanoid shape, the gumiho uses their original size, loses their jaws strike but retains their claws strike, and their Speed is reduced to 25 feet. A gumiho is never able to completely conceal one of their nine tails through this transformation.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Snapping Critical
items.description:
Триггер: The gumiho critically hits with a claw or jaws Strike

Эффект: The gumiho uses its fox marble to channel the life force lost by the target and heal for half the amount of damage dealt.

items.name: Разящие повязки могучих ударов +2
items.description:
Когда вы инвестируете эти расшитые полоски ткани, то должны медитировать и медленно обматывать их вокруг ваших рук. Эти обмотки имеют гравированные на них оружейные руны, чтобы давать вашим безоружным атакам преимущества этих рун, что делает ваши безоружные атаки похожими на магическое оружие. Например, разящие повязки могучих ударов +1 дают вам бонус предмета +1 к броскам на атаку с ними и увеличивают урон от безоружных атак с одной кости урона до двух (обычно 2d4 вместо 1d4, но если у ваших кулаков другой размер кости урона или у вас есть другие безоружные атаки, то используйте их кости урона).

Вы можете улучшать, добавлять и переносить руны с повязок и на повязки, как с обычным оружием, а так же можете прикреплять к повязкам талисманы. Для этих целей считайте повязки как оружие ближнего боя из группы "драка" с лёгкой Массой. Руны свойств применяются только когда они могут быть применимы к используемыми вами безоружными атаками. Например, свойство, которое должно применять к рубящему оружию не будет функционировать когда вы атакуете кулаками, но вы получите эти преимущества если атакуете когтями или другой рубящей безоружной атакой.

items.name: Morin Khurr
items.description: Ручные инструменты включают волынку, небольшой набор колокольчиков, маленькие барабаны, скрипки и виолы, флейты и блок-флейты, маленькие арфы, лютни, трубы и инструменты аналогичного размера. Мастер может счесть, что особенно большие ручные инструменты (такие как туба), имеют бо́льшую Массу. Тяжёлые инструменты, такие как большие барабаны, полный набор колокольчиков и клавишные инструменты, менее портативны и, как правило, должны быть неподвижными во время игры.

items.name: Кошачья удача
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Halspin rerolls the save and takes the better result.

Hantu Belian.name: Hantu Belian
Hantu Belian.description:
Hantus are manifestations of the powerful nature spirits that inhabit all things, from animals to objects to the environment itself. As spiritual representations of whatever they inhabit, hantus follow no preordained agenda. Some hantus choose to act as guardians, defending the forest or waterway that they represent, while others simply set out into the world and experience the wonders of life in ways that their physical form-be it a boulder, bamboo stand, or tapir-would typically be unable to enjoy.

Hantus are most well known in the archipelago of Minata, particularly in the southern islands of Rendah Pulu, where animists believe that hantus manifest in locations imbued with significant spiritual power. To the residents of Rendah Pulu, hantus exist as manifestations of their culture's anxieties, fears, and ills. An individual who encounters a hantu might interpret the meeting as a sign that they have dwelt for too long on their particular worries (or the opposite: they have ignored the source of their anxieties for too long).

The hantu belian represents the spiritual essence of a tiger and typically manifests as a ghostly bird perched on a tiger's back. Hantu belians commit acts of great destruction as well as restoration. They sometimes possess humanoids to cause great discord and devastation, though their intentions are typically borne of amusement or boredom rather than malice.

items.name: Unrest Aura
items.description: 30 feet. A creature that enters the emanation must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] until the end of its next turn (1 minute on a critical failure). During this confusion, the creature attempts to cause turmoil, using its actions to create disarray in its general vicinity by throwing around objects or scaring passersby. A creature that succeeds at its save is immune to all hantu belians' unrest auras for 1 hour. A hantu belian can suppress or resume the effects of this aura as an action, which has the concentrate trait.

items.name: Greater Possession
items.description: A hantu belian can use its possession innate spell to possess a creature for up to 1 hour rather than 1 minute. While possessing a creature, the hantu uses its own Acrobatics, Athletics, and Stealth modifiers unless those of the possessed creature are higher.

Hantu Denai.name: Hantu Denai
Hantu Denai.description:
Hantus are manifestations of the powerful nature spirits that inhabit all things, from animals to objects to the environment itself. As spiritual representations of whatever they inhabit, hantus follow no preordained agenda. Some hantus choose to act as guardians, defending the forest or waterway that they represent, while others simply set out into the world and experience the wonders of life in ways that their physical form-be it a boulder, bamboo stand, or tapir-would typically be unable to enjoy.

Hantus are most well known in the archipelago of Minata, particularly in the southern islands of Rendah Pulu, where animists believe that hantus manifest in locations imbued with significant spiritual power. To the residents of Rendah Pulu, hantus exist as manifestations of their culture's anxieties, fears, and ills. An individual who encounters a hantu might interpret the meeting as a sign that they have dwelt for too long on their particular worries (or the opposite: they have ignored the source of their anxieties for too long).

Interestingly, although hantus are incorporeal, they still retain tangible characteristics as varied as hantus themselves. Some give off a potent odor, such as the scent of durian or jasmine. Others leave corporeal droppings, such as literal animal waste or tufts of fur left on a tree trunk.

When an environment such as a forest or stream is at risk of overhunting or overfishing, the land itself can manifest as a hantu denai in order to defend itself from overconsumption. Hantu denais stalk hunters and emit haunting cries of native fauna to scare off poachers, loggers, and other despoilers of nature before resorting to violence if necessary.

items.description: Though an inmyeonjo still needs to eat, drink, and sleep, they don't age and can't die of old age.
