Требования: Jin-Hae is wielding two hook swords

Эффект: Jin-Hae either links her swords together or unlinks them. If the swords are linked, she can make linked hook sword Strikes; if the swords are unlinked, she can make hook sword Strikes.

items.name: штраф состояния −1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти
Susceptible to Death
items.description:
Though phantoms aren't alive, neither are they undead, and they are uniquely vulnerable to the effects of death.

A phantom whose Hit Points are reduced to 0 as a result of a death effect (such as from a spell like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]) is immediately whisked away to the River of Souls, where their soul resumes the usual path to the afterlife.

items.name: Call a Battle Echo
items.description: Эффект: Jin-Hae pulls one of the battle echoes to her hand. She is fully aware of every echo and can always pull the one she wants, but she cannot call an echo that has already been unsealed.

items.name: Combined Charge
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Триггер: Cloudsplitter Strides or Tramples within 5 feet of Jin-Hae

Эффект: Jin-Hae leaps onto Cloudsplitter's back as he charges. She can make a single melee attack against any target they pass during Cloudsplitter's movement.

items.name: Wind-Fire Charge
items.description:
Требования: Jin-Hae is wielding her feng huo lun

Эффект: Jin-Hae blasts off on her feng huo lun, leaving an elemental trail in her wake. She Strides up to twice her Speed and makes a feng huo lun Strike at any point during her movement. The path left by her movement is filled with her choice of an 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.it4ZsAi6XgvGcodc] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu] spell. Jin-Hae is unaffected by any walls she creates with this ability. She cannot use Wind-Fire Charge again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Wind-Fire Charge]]{1d4 rounds}. If she uses Wind-Fire Charge again, the wall created by her previous Wind-Fire Charge disappears as soon as her action is completed.

items.name: Wind-Fire Chariot
items.description:
Требования: Jin-Hae is wielding two feng huo lun

Эффект: Jin-Hae's feng huo lun float by her feet, giving her the benefits of 7th- level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.U0hL0LLaprcnAyzC]. While this lasts, she can wield her feng huo lun even while her hands are full by kicking with them, and her feng huo lun gain the thrown 20 feet trait as well as the effects of a returning rune.

Kas Xi Rai.name: Kas Xi Rai
Kas Xi Rai.ac: (42 vs. reactions and ranged weapon attacks)

items.name: +2 Gerater Striking Greater Corrosive Handwraps of Mighty Blows
items.description:
Когда вы инвестируете эти расшитые полоски ткани, то должны медитировать и медленно обматывать их вокруг ваших рук. Эти обмотки имеют гравированные на них оружейные руны, чтобы давать вашим безоружным атакам преимущества этих рун, что делает ваши безоружные атаки похожими на магическое оружие. Например, разящие повязки могучих ударов +1 дают вам бонус предмета +1 к броскам на атаку с ними и увеличивают урон от безоружных атак с одной кости урона до двух (обычно 2d4 вместо 1d4, но если у ваших кулаков другой размер кости урона или у вас есть другие безоружные атаки, то используйте их кости урона).

Вы можете улучшать, добавлять и переносить руны с повязок и на повязки, как с обычным оружием, а так же можете прикреплять к повязкам талисманы. Для этих целей считайте повязки как оружие ближнего боя из группы "драка" с лёгкой Массой. Руны свойств применяются только когда они могут быть применимы к используемыми вами безоружными атаками. Например, свойство, которое должно применять к рубящему оружию не будет функционировать когда вы атакуете кулаками, но вы получите эти преимущества если атакуете когтями или другой рубящей безоружной атакой.

items.name: Bracers of Armor II
items.description: These stiff leather armguards grant you a +2 item bonus to AC and saving throws, and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5. You can affix talismans to bracers of armor as though they were light armor.

items.name: AC 42 vs. Reactions and Ranged Weapon Attacks
Tangled Forest Trip
items.description:
Требования: Kas Xi Rai is in tangled forest stance

Триггер: A creature leaves a space within Kas Xi Rai's reach

Эффект: The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:37] save, @Check[acrobatics|dc:37] check, or @Check[athletics|dc:37] check. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] for that action.

items.name: Exhausting Flurry
items.description: When Kas Xi Rai targets the same creature with two Strikes from her Flurry of Blows and at least one hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:39] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and take a –5-foot status penalty to land Speed while enfeebled. On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and takes a –10-foot status penalty to land Speed while enfeebled.

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: Kas Xi Rai makes two Strikes with her fist. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Замах опутывающего леса
items.description: Kas Xi Rai makes a lashing branch Strike. If she hits and deals damage, she forces the target to move 5 feet into a space within her reach.

items.name: Стойка опутывающего леса
items.description: Kas Xi Rai extends her arms and enters a deadly tree-like combat stance. As long as she is in this stance, Kas Xi Rai can use Tangled Forest Trip and Tangled Forest Rake and make lashing branch Strikes with her fists.

Koto Zekora.name: Koto Zekora
Koto Zekora.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

items.name: Магия наследия крови
items.description:
When Koto Zekora casts a bloodline spell, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ek5XI0aEdZhBgm21], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7], she gains a +1 status bonus to skill checks for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.tvybMInVm415jA3p]

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Изменение формы
items.description:
Koto Zekora takes on the appearance of an ogre. This doesn't change her Speed or Strike attack and damage.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Kun.name: Kun
Kun.description: Hungry and resentful, the malevolent kun is a mythological fish monster that dwells in the remotest, coldest depths of the ocean. This massively powerful creatures could easily rule a subaquatic domain if they cared to, but kuns are also famous for their total self-absorption and complete ambivalence toward other forms of life. A kun remains as far away from other creatures as they can, subsisting on only their own icy hatred. They can consume and digest prey, but such feedings are incidental. Most kuns remain ignorant and uncaring, keeping themselves in the dark, disregarding any signs of life around them except to occasionally lash out with a spiteful attack.
Kun.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Spite
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within reach of the kun's tail uses an action to attack or heal another creature (including the kun)

Эффект: The kun bats the triggering creature away with their tail, making a tail Strike against the creature. On a hit, the action is disrupted and the creature is pushed 10 feet.

items.name: Funnel
items.description:
The kun inhales violently, sucking in heat and all creatures in the water in a @Template[cone|distance:60]. Creatures in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:33|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save or take @Damage[10d8[cold]|options:area-damage] damage. The kun can't Funnel again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Funnel]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает половину урона.

Провал: The creature takes full damage and is pulled 30 feet toward the kun.

Критический провал: The creature takes double damage and is pulled 60 feet toward the kun.

items.name: Heart of Darkness
items.description: Whenever the kun makes an attack from within an area of darkness, their attack deals an additional 2d6 spirit damage.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Huge, @Damage[(3d12+7)[bludgeoning]] damage, Rupture 30

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.name: Bracers of Armor II
items.description: These stiff leather armguards grant you a +2 item bonus to AC and saving throws, and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5. You can affix talismans to bracers of armor as though they were light armor.

items.name: Wooden Harrow Deck
items.description:
Эта колода карт, используемая как азартными игроками, так и прорицателями, выпускается в нескольких разновидностях.

Обычные колоды карт харро изготавливаются из высококачественной бумаги и содержат иллюстрации — гадалки и провидцы обычно используют именно такие колоды.

items.name: Control Harrow Cards
items.description: Lantondo can Strike with any of their harrow cards as long as they can see their target. When Lantondo Strikes with a harrow card, they can leave the card on any surface in the target's space or return the card to their deck at the end of the action.

items.name: Call Dancers
items.description: Laruhao sends out a pulse of inviting melody that calls more yokai from the ether, restoring @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points to the dancing night parade.

items.name: Master of Barriers
items.description: Laruhao wishes for nothing more than to dance atop his yagura, undisturbed. When he uses his house of imaginary walls composition spell, he creates four 10-foot-by-10-foot walls in a cube around him. A creature must succeed at a DC 41 counteract check to teleport within these walls; otherwise, the teleportation attempt fails.

items.name: Dance, Puppets, Dance!
items.description: Laruhao plays an invigorating melody that signals his horde to attack. The dancing night parade can use either Seiya! Soiya! or the two-action version of Wasshoi! Wasshoi! as a reaction.

Lophiithu.name: Lophiithu
Lophiithu.description: Lophiithus dwell in the deepest ocean trenches, places untouched by light, hope, or mortal comprehension. They appear to be gaping maws with distended jaws, vestigial flaps of putrefying flesh, and filamentous tentacles tipped with glowing light. Their extraplanar mouths take up most of their bodies, leaving no room for other organs, and any prey they swallow is transported to the Maelstrom for digestion.

items.name: Beguiling Lure
items.description: A creature hit by a lophiithu's lure must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:41|traits:illusion,mental,occult,visual] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg] with the lophiithu's lures for 1 minute. On a critical failure, it can't use reactions while it remains fascinated. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune for 1 hour.

items.name: Dimensional Swallow
items.description: The lophiithu's digestive organs exist in the Maelstrom, regardless of the location of their external form. The lophiithu can swallow any number of creatures of any size. Creatures that Escape the lophiithu's stomach do so normally. Creatures that cut themselves free instead find themselves in the Maelstrom near nothing but one of the lophiithu's disembodied stomachs. When the lophiithu dies, their stomach becomes a rift connecting to their mouth, allowing a creature to return to their plane. This rift disappears after 1 minute.

items.name: Lure Whip
items.description: The lophiithu makes a lure Strike against each creature within reach. These attacks count toward the lophiithu's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after these attacks.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Gargantuan, @Damage[(3d12+10)[bludgeoning]] damage, Rupture 44 and dimensional swallow

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Mammoth Turtle.name: Mammoth Turtle
Mammoth Turtle.description:
Если обычная кусающаяся черепаха отличается вспыльчивостью, то гигантская кусающаяся черепаха, похоже, сознательно проявляет жестокость по отношению ко всему, что осмеливается вторгнуться в ее владения. При длине более @Unit[Foot|20]{20 футов} и весе в тысячи фунтов это существо способно проглотить гуманоида целиком. Болотные сообщества, особенно боггарды и людоящеры, часто пытались приручать гигантских кусающихся черепах, чтобы они служили им могущественными стражами, но в большинстве таких случаев, жертвы начинают накапливаться очень быстро. Те, кому не посчастливилось быть целиком проглоченным гигантской кусающейся черепахой, обнаруживают, что даже желудок этого существа в некоторой степени бронирован, что затрудняет его разрезание.

Эти, обычно кроткие и послушные существа предпочитают, чтобы их оставили в покое, но сварливая кусающая черепаха является особенно вспыльчивым исключением из этого правила.

Melodic Squall.name: Melodic Squall
Melodic Squall.description: This cloud of song and sound has been caught by the wind and carried across the air. While the melody on the wind might enjoy the beauty of music, it is by nature a destructive elemental force.

Mogaru's Breath.name: Mogaru's Breath
Mogaru's Breath.disable: @Check[performance|dc:50|name:Divert Mogaru's Attention] (legendary) or @Check[deception|dc:53|name:Divert Mogaru's Attention] (legendary) to momentarily divert Mogaru's attention
Mogaru's Breath.reset: Mogaru must wait [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} before letting loose another gout of fire.
Mogaru's Breath.Hdescription: Mogaru exhales a blast of intense flames to eradicate any meddlesome pests in the area.

Muckish Creep.name: Muckish Creep
Muckish Creep.description:
Legends say that the first muckish creeps were born at the site of a mass grave where the souls of murdered prisoners coalesced into the surrounding soil. Another myth tells that muckish creeps were elementals so vile that their kin banished them from the Plane of Earth. Regardless of their true origins, muckish creeps are wicked creatures that resemble mud given a humanoid shape. The mud is no ordinary mixture of earth and water, however, for muckish creeps feed on the blood of the living, and they use this blood to keep their own forms moist and malleable.

Muckish creeps are particularly tenacious and single-minded when it comes to choosing prey. Once a muckish creep selects its next victim, there is little one can do to stop it, since it can seep through even the smallest cracks between doors, walls, and windows. A muckish creep typically waits until its target falls asleep before pressing itself into the creature's home, intent to kill. For all its tenacity during the hunt, the muckish creep is pragmatic when it comes to the actual kill, using its body to fill the victim's airways with mud and suffocate them.

items.name: Сжатие
items.description: A muckish creep can move through a gap at least 6 inches wide without Squeezing and can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt] through any gap at least 1 inch wide.

items.name: Mud Trail
items.description: When a muckish creep Strides or Steps, it leaves behind a slimy mud trail that coats the traversed area. All traversed squares are covered in @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8] (@Check[reflex|dc:26] or @Check[acrobatics|dc:26|name:Mud Trails]) until the start of the muckish creep's next turn.

items.name: Slippery Body
items.description: A muckish creep's body allows it to slip away from most restraints. It gains a +4 status bonus to checks to Escape. On a success, it gets a critical success instead. On a critical failure, it gets a failure instead.

items.name: Elude Grasp
items.description:
Триггер: A creature succeeds at an attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD] the muckish creep.

Эффект: The muckish creep attempts an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9].

items.name: Blinding Mud
items.description: When a muckish creep hits a creature with a mud ball Strike, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] on a critical hit). The creature can use an Interact action to wipe away the mud and remove the dazzled or blinded condition.

items.name: Подавлять
items.description:
Требования: The muckish creep has a creature grabbed.

Эффект: The muckish creep fills the grabbed creature's mouth and nose with mud. The creature begins to suffocate unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. The suffocating creature or any adjacent creatures can clear the suffocating creature's airway with an Interact action.

items.name: Шляпа маскировки [Отличная]
items.description:
Эта обычная на вид шляпа позволяет вам маскировать себя иллюзиями.

Активация: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]

Частота: Сколько угодно раз в день

Эффект: Шляпа колдует на вас @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo] 2-го ранга. В процессе маскировки вы можете волшебным образом изменить внешний вид шляпы, чтобы она выглядела как гребень, лента, шлем или другой головной убор.

items.name: Быстрое изменение
items.description: Nai Yan Fei adopts a mundane disguise, appearing as a nondescript human with a neutral alignment and a mundane occupation such as common laborer, farmer, or peasant. She can return to her typical persona as empress at any time by using Quick Change again.

items.name: Ослабляющий удар
items.description:
Триггер: Nai Yan Fei hits an off-guard creature and deals damage.

Эффект: Nai Yan Fei applies one of the following debilitations, which lasts until the end of her next turn.

  • Ослабление: Цель получает штраф состояния −10 футов к своим Скоростям.
  • Ослабление: Цель становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблена 1}.
  • Ослабление: The target can't flank other creatures, and it can't provide flanking for its allies.
  • Ослабление: The target doesn't gain a circumstance bonus to AC from Raising a Shield, lesser cover, or standard cover; it gains only a +2 circumstance bonus to AC from greater cover or Taking Cover.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.yBTASi3FvnReAwHy]

items.name: Мастерский удар
items.description:
Триггер: Nai Yan Fei hits an off-guard creature and deals damage.

Эффект: The target attempts a @Check[fortitude|dc:39] save. It then becomes immune to Nai Yan Fei's Master Strike for 1 day.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of Nai Yan Fei's next turn.

Провал: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 4 rounds.

Критический провал: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 4 rounds, knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf] for 2 hours, or killed (Nai Yan Fei's choice).

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Nai Yan Fei's Strikes deal an additional 4d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

Old Man Statue.name: Old Man Statue
Old Man Statue.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Божественное разрушение
items.description:
Когда ОЗ божественного стража снижаются до 0, он извергается божественной энергией в @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30-футовой эманации}, нанося @Damage[14d6[vitality]|options:area-damage]. Каждое существо в области должно совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:32|options:area-effect,damaging-effect]{Воли} со следующими исходами.

Критический успех: Существо получает половину урона.

Успех: Существо получает полный урон.

Провал: Существо получает полный урон и становится временно проклятым божеством-покровителем. Существо становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблено 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманено 1} на 1 день; это эффект @Trait[Curse]{проклятия}, использующий КС Воли в качестве КС противодействия.

Критический провал: Как провал, за исключением того, что существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблено 2} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманено 2}.

items.name: Связь веры
items.description: A divine warden can't attack a creature that openly wears or displays the religious symbol of the divine warden's patron deity unless that creature uses a hostile action against the divine warden first. If the divine warden is intelligent, it can also attack a creature it believes isn't faithful to its deity or who wears the religious symbol as a ruse (typically after succeeding at a Perception check to Sense Motive).

items.name: Оружие верных
items.description: A divine warden always wields its patron deity's favored weapon. If the weapon is a ranged weapon, the divine warden automatically generates new ammunition with each attack. For a divine warden of 4th level or higher, the deity's favored weapon gains the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp] rune while the divine warden wields it; at 12th level, these effects are of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Greater Striking} rune, and at 19th level, they're instead of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.woxl2FrrgAcJDu0t]{Major Striking} rune.

items.name: Инструмент веры
items.description: Божественный страж — это маяк веры для божества. Жрец божества-покровителя божественного стража может направить заклинание @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs] из божественного стража, которого он видит в радиусе 60 футов. Жрец определяет цели и область заклинания, как если бы он находился в пространстве божественного стража.

Orochi.name: Orochi
Orochi.description: An orochi is an enormous serpent with eight heads and eight tails that lives among large waterways. Orochi are vile, amoral creatures kept at bay only with yearly sacrifices. Most settlements unable to satisfy an orochi with a sacrifice soon meet their destruction.

items.name: Multiple Heads
items.description: A creature can attempt to sever one of the orochi's eight heads by specifically targeting it and dealing damage equal to the head's HP. A head not completely severed returns to full HP at the end of the attacking creature's turn. An orochi that loses all of their heads immediately dies.

items.name: Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
60 футов. Спасбросок @Check[will|dc:37|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Head: Weaknesses and Immunities
items.description:
ОЗ: 60, multiple heads

Terra-cotta warriors guard the tombs of ancient rulers, where they stand vigil, animating only when intruders break in to pilfer riches or defile the tomb itself. Each warrior is meticulously crafted from clay and given unique features.

A single terra-cotta warrior stands 6 feet tall and weighs 600 pounds.

items.name: +3 Greater Striking Erhu Bow
items.description: Razu wields his instrument's unique rune- enchanted bow as a deadly weapon. His decades of training with the item allow him to augment it with his own battle cries so that it also deals sonic damage. By attaching the bow's case to its end, he can change the weapon's damage to piercing and use the bow much like a short spear. Any other creature who wields the erhu bow does not deal sonic damage with it, but the weapon otherwise possesses the traits listed above. If sold without its runes, the bow is worth 50 gp.

Инструмент маэстро может быть создан в виде любого из ручных музыкальных инструментов. Он даёт вам бонус предмета +3 к проверкам Выступления, при игре музыки на нём.

Активация—Чарующее выступление: 2 (@Trait[Manipulate]{воздействие})

items.description: This sour potion enlivens your tongue with unusual flavors and uncommon eloquence, allowing you to speak and understand all languages for 4 hours after you drink it. This doesn't allow you to read these languages in their written form.

items.name: Bow Basher

His decades of training with the item allow him to augment it with his own battle cries so that it also deals sonic damage. By attaching the bow's case to its end, he can change the weapon's damage to piercing and use the bow much like a short spear. Any other creature who wields the erhu bow does not deal sonic damage with it, but the weapon otherwise possesses the traits listed above. If sold without its runes, the bow is worth 50 gp.

items.name: Incredible Volume
items.description: Razu's auditory effects that normally have a range 60 feet or less or an emanation area with a radius of 60 feet or less instead have a range or radius of 300 feet. His auditory effects that normally have a range of greater than 60 feet or an emanation area with a radius of greater than 60 feet instead have a range or radius of 1,200 feet (unless it was already farther). His performances are audible up to 10 miles away.

Rivka (Cimurlian).name: Rivka (Cimurlian)
Rivka (Cimurlian).description:
Rivkas are parasitic monsters that cling to the sides of kaiju. In their natural form, they resemble giant cockroaches with eight razor-like legs and two mouths-one between two vicious pincers plus a second, much larger mouth on their abdomen. With this secondary mouth they feed off the primordial energy of whichever kaiju they've latched onto.

In the wake of a kaiju attack, a rivka detaches from its host and wades into the disaster zone to prey on the unsuspecting populace by presenting itself as an emissary of the kaiju and demanding tribute. According to this cruel charlatan, only sacrifices of blood and gold can appease their master-though of course the rivka absconds with these offerings before the gifts ever reach the kaiju (such tributes would mean little to the kaiju anyway). Particularly heinous rivkas search the rubble for dead victims to impersonate, magically adopting the visage of a beloved city elder or priest in order to stoke the citizens' paranoia.

Drinking kaiju blood has a strange effect on a rivka's anatomy, enriching both its defensive and offensive capabilities with the primal energy of its host. Other creatures have attempted to drink kaiju blood and replicate this phenomenon, always to terrible effect. Clearly rivkas have coevolved with kaiju in order to metabolize their ancient blood.

Sand Whirlwind.name: Sand Whirlwind
Sand Whirlwind.disable: @Check[religion|dc:38|name:State an Iroran Koan|traits:haunt]{Religion} (expert) to state an Iroran koan about being complete only upon recognizing one's incompleteness, or @Check[occultism|dc:41|name:Ward Against Hauntings|traits:haunt] (master) to create a ward against future hauntings
Sand Whirlwind.reset: The haunt deactivates after 1 minute and re-forms after 1 hour. The haunt is disabled and doesn't re-form if at least two creatures spend 1 minute to create an image with the sand. Creating the image requires a successful @Check[crafting|dc:30|name:Create Image in Sand] or @Check[thievery|dc:30|name:Create Image in Sand]check.
Sand Whirlwind.routine: (1 action) The haunt's violent winds savagely buffet everyone in the room, dealing@Damage[(6d10+30)[bludgeoning]] damage to living creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic|traits:haunt]). On a critically failed save, a creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.
Sand Whirlwind.Hdescription: Buffeting winds swirl sharp grains of sand about the room.

Sanzuwu.name: Sanzuwu
Sanzuwu.description: Those who feast on the sun are said to carry its power within them. Sanzuwus are small crows with red plumage and dark throats. According to legend, they stole their burning power from the sun and now fly across the sky as blinding streaks of fire. When they land on the earth, it ignites around them, causing unbound destruction. A handful of people worship these radiant birds and inscribe their three-legged visage on coins, items, and weapons.

items.name: Golden Sun
items.description: 10 feet. A golden aura envelopes the sanzuwu, protecting them from weak magic. Any non-cold spells of 3rd level or lower burn away and are ineffective. A sanzuwu can deactivate or activate the golden aura as a free action with the concentrate trait.

items.name: Scorching Gaze
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 30 feet targets the sanzuwu or one of their allies with a weapon attack

Эффект: The sanzuwu focuses their gaze on the triggering creature's weapon, heating it to a burning temperature for an instant. The creature takes @Damage[4d8[fire]] damage unless the creature Releases the weapon as a free action.

items.name: Fiery Transformation
items.description: The sanzuwu transforms into an enormous bird made of flame. As the sanzuwu begins their transformation, creatures within a @Template[emanation|distance:10] take @Damage[6d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] save). While in their flame form, the sanzuwu gains the effects of 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]. They can use Fiery Transformation again to revert back to their standard form.

items.name: Лучистый взрыв
items.description: The sanzuwu opens their mouth to produce a bead of burning energy, hurling it a point within 200 feet. The bead detonates, dealing @Damage[7d8[fire],4d10[sonic]|options:area-damage]{7d8 fire damage and 4d10 sonic damage} to all creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:blinded] save). Creatures that critically fail become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 round. The sanzuwu can't use Radiant Blast again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiant Blast]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Выжечь землю
items.description:
Требования: The sanzuwu is standing on the ground

Эффект: The sanzuwu Strides. A 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu] appears in all the spaces the sanzuwu left during this movement, lasting for 1 round. The sanzuwu can't use Scorch Earth again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Scorch Earth]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Transfixing Sunbeam
items.description:
Требования: The sanzuwu is in their fiery form

Эффект: The sanzuwu spreads their wings, emitting a bright cascade of light in a @Template[cone|distance:30]. Creatures in the cone must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:33] save.

Успех: Существо невредимо.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 1}.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 2}.

Shadow Yai.name: Shadow Yai
Shadow Yai.description: Oni who assume the form of shadow giants are known as shadow yais. Many shadow yais crave the pleasures of music and go to great lengths to secure bardic or musically inclined supplicants. Smaller beings who refuse to submit to a shadow yai are subject to painful, drawn out, and strangely beautiful deaths, for a shadow yai has a special way of evoking melodic cries and screams from their victims: a veritable symphony of pain. Individuals of particular musical skill who accompany a shadow yai can find the experience extremely lucrative and enriching-as long as they don't run afoul of their liege.

items.name: Теневой шаг
items.description:
Требования: The shadow yai is in an area of dim light or darkness or is standing in the shadow of any Large or larger object

Эффект: The shadow yai instantly teleports to another location that's in dim light or darkness or to a space that's in the shadow of any Large or larger object within 60 feet.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The shadow yai takes on the appearance of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.JSKZryHwf0Ggq8KR]. This doesn't change its Speed or Strike attack and damage.

items.name: Shadow Touch
items.description:
A shadow yai's touch harms their target's spiritual essence in addition to its body. A creature hit by the shadow yai's fist Strike must attempt a @Check[will|dc:36] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает @Damage[2d6[void]].

Провал: The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and takes @Damage[3d6[void]] damage. As long as the creature is drained as a result of this ability, it loses the ability to speak above a whisper. When the creature attempts to Cast a Spell with a verbal component, it must succeed at a flat check or the spell is disrupted. The DC of this flat check is equal to 5 plus the creature's drained value (for example, DC 7 if the creature is drained 2).

Критический провал: As failure, but the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and takes @Damage[6d6[void]] damage.

items.name: Отлично разящие повязки могучих ударов +2
items.description:
Когда вы инвестируете эти расшитые полоски ткани, то должны медитировать и медленно обматывать их вокруг ваших рук. Эти обмотки имеют гравированные на них оружейные руны, чтобы давать вашим безоружным атакам преимущества этих рун, что делает ваши безоружные атаки похожими на магическое оружие. Например, разящие повязки могучих ударов +1 дают вам бонус предмета +1 к броскам на атаку с ними и увеличивают урон от безоружных атак с одной кости урона до двух (обычно 2d4 вместо 1d4, но если у ваших кулаков другой размер кости урона или у вас есть другие безоружные атаки, то используйте их кости урона).

Вы можете улучшать, добавлять и переносить руны с повязок и на повязки, как с обычным оружием, а так же можете прикреплять к повязкам талисманы. Для этих целей считайте повязки как оружие ближнего боя из группы "драка" с лёгкой Массой. Руны свойств применяются только когда они могут быть применимы к используемыми вами безоружными атаками. Например, свойство, которое должно применять к рубящему оружию не будет функционировать когда вы атакуете кулаками, но вы получите эти преимущества если атакуете когтями или другой рубящей безоружной атакой.

items.name: Ловкое уклонение
items.description:
Триггер: Hakusa is targeted with a melee or ranged attack by an attacker she can see.

Эффект: Hakusa gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

items.name: Disorienting Tumble
items.description: Hakusa leaps around and over her opponents, disorienting them, to gain the upper hand in combat. When she successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumbles Through} a creature's space, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the end of Hakusa's turn.

items.name: Мощный кулак
items.description: Hakusa's fist Strikes are treated as cold iron and silver and don't take penalties when making lethal attacks.

items.name: Pressure Point Attack
items.description:
Hakusa targets a foe's pressure points to debilitate them. Hakusa makes a fist Strike. On a hit, the target takes damage as normal and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save. Regardless of the result of the save, the target is temporarily immune to Pressure Point Attack for 1 minute.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target's muscles become temporarily weaker. For 1 round, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] check when attempting to use actions with the manipulate trait or the action is lost.

Провал: Как успех, но продолжительность составляет 1 минуту.

Критический провал: As success, but the duration is 1 minute, the flat check is @Check[flat|dc:11], and the target also takes –10-foot status penalty to their Speed for the duration.

items.description: Hakusa's Strikes deal an additional 3d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Swallows in Flight
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Hakusa strikes a series of pressure points on her target's body that redirects its ki to the heart, before following up with a palm strike to the sternum. She makes a fingers Strike and a palm Strike, dealing damage as normal. If both hit, the target takes @Damage[8d10[void]] damage as its life energy escapes from its body in a shower of bird-shaped sparks. The target attempts a @Check[fortitude|dc:43] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target takes half the void damage.

Провал: The target takes full damage, its life energy exploding violently from its back in a @Template[cone|distance:30] originating from the target. All of Hakusa's other enemies in the cone also take the void damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:43|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Критический провал: As failure, but the target takes double void damage.

Sigbin.name: Sigbin
Sigbin.description:
Resembling hornless goats with extremely long tails, sigbins live in forests and prey on inhabitants of nearby humanoid villages. Sigbins drink the blood of their victims by biting into their shadows, rather than their flesh. This process typically leaves the victim so fatigued that they must lie down to rest, at which point the sigbin finishes the job by sinking their jaws into the person's chest and consuming their heart.

Due to their nauseating smell, many sigbins hide among livestock and in other overwhelmingly odorous places. Sigbins have the ability to hide in plain sight simply by standing stock still, but this power works only against adults and elders; for whatever reason, children and young animals can see the invisible sigbins. Many believe this is because children are unsullied by the cruel ways of the world, and so their eyes are still innocent enough to spot the devious beasts. Unfortunately, most adults tend to ignore children's cries about the monsters, chalking up such claims to overactive imaginations or attention-seeking behavior, inadvertently allowing sigbins to continue their hunts uninterrupted.
Sigbin.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Вонь
items.description: 30 feet. A creature that enters the emanation must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:19|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure. While within the aura, the creature takes a -2 circumstance penalty to saves to recover from the sickened condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is immune to all sigbins' stenches for 1 minute.

items.name: Unassuming Cloak
items.description: A sigbin becomes almost imperceptible if it stands completely still. If the sigbin does not move or attack during its turn, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]. It remains invisible until it moves or takes a hostile action. Children and young creatures, like animal cubs, can see the sigbin normally, even while it's invisible.

items.name: Shadow Drain
items.description:
Требования: The sigbin is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk] by its target.

Эффект: The sigbin makes a fangs Strike (unlike other Strikes, this does not end its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{invisibility} if the sigbin is invisible). On a hit, the target takes nonlethal damage from the Strike and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical hit). The sigbin gains 15 temporary Hit Points that remain for 1 hour.

items.name: Bludgeoning Energy
items.description: The students' combine elemental energies with physical brawn, blasting opponents with huge gusts of compressed air instead of typical energies. Any of the students' spells that deal energy damage (such as fireball, burning hands, ray of frost, and so on) instead deal bludgeoning damage.

Speakers to the Wind (Gnoll Cascade Bear.name: Speakers to the Wind (Gnoll Cascade Bearer)

Spirit Turtle.name: Spirit Turtle
Spirit Turtle.description:
Spirit turtles are benevolent fey known to heal those in need and confer other powerful gifts. These gentle giants resemble enormous turtles and often bear entire ecosystems on their shells.

In ancient times, so the legend goes, spirit turtles used to grant wishes to many mortals. After millennia of such encounters, the giant creatures grew tired and went into hiding or returned to their home plane, the First World. Those few spirit turtles who remain on Golarion now grant their favors only to the purest and worthiest mortal petitioners.
Spirit Turtle.hp: regeneration 25 (deactivated by cold iron or unholy)

Sthira.name: Sthira
Sthira.description:
The Wall of Heaven claims many intrepid climbers. Some such travelers come seeking fortune. Others seek enlightenment. Many, however, find only an icy death. With no means for a proper burial, many of these unfortunate souls remain abandoned to the ice, their bodies becoming macabre guideposts along mountain trails.

Through means unknown, the most willful of these frozen travelers reanimate to seek vengeance upon the living for their denied burial. Such creatures, called sthiras, are composed of multiple bodies or body parts frozen together into one horrific monstrosity.
Sthira.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Storm of Vengeance (hail only each round)
Create Sthira
items.description: When a creature dies while it has persistent cold damage from the sthira's frostbite, the creature rises as a sthira in 24 hours. If the creature is grabbed by the sthira when it dies, the dying creature becomes permanently fused with the sthira instead. In this case, the sthira immediately recovers a number of Hit Points equal to the half the dead creature's maximum Hit Points.

items.name: Frozen to the Touch
items.description: A creature that damages the sthira with an unarmed attack, tries to Grapple it, or otherwise touches it takes @Damage[6d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save).

items.name: Freezing Death
items.description: 20 feet. A creature that starts its turn in the aura takes @Damage[6d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save). If the creature is grabbed or restrained by the sthira, it takes one degree of success worse than it rolled.

items.name: Обморожение
items.description:
A creature that takes cold damage from a sthira's Strikes or aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:42] save. A creature that already has persistent cold damage from frostbite ignores this effect.

Критический успех: The creature is unaffected, and is temporarily immune to this ability for 1 hour.

Успех: Существо невредимо.

Провал: The creature takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,cold]] damage.

Критический провал: As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Swatting Tail.name: Swatting Tail
Swatting Tail.disable: @Check[performance|dc:45|name:Divert Mogaru's Attention] (legendary) or @Check[deception|dc:48|name:Divert Mogaru's Attention] (legendary) to momentarily divert Mogaru's attention
Swatting Tail.reset: Mogaru doesn't swat his tail again for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
Swatting Tail.Hdescription: Mogaru's tail sweeps forth, causing an arc of devastation in a @Template[cone|distance:60].

Syndara the Sculptor.name: Syndara the Sculptor
Syndara the Sculptor.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. chaotic

items.name: Keeper of the Lighthouse
items.description: Syndara can choose whether he is affected by his worldspheres.

items.name: Portal Redirection
items.description:
Триггер: Syndara is targeted by a ranged Strike or spell attack roll

Эффект: Syndara opens a portal in front of the incoming missile, then opens another portal nearby that fires the missile at another creature within 60 feet of him. He takes no damage from the triggering attack and makes a ranged Strike with a +43 attack bonus. The Strike deals damage according to the triggering ability.

items.name: Spatial Sense
items.description: Syndara instinctively knows the position of all creatures and objects within the Glass Lighthouse as a precise sense. His senses do not extend into extraplanar spaces (such as a bag of holding), even if the entrance to these spaces is within the Lighthouse.

items.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Chaotic
Essence Reflection
items.description: Syndara and his reflection are two linked existences. If one of them is affected by a harmful effect, they can shift the harmful effect to the other as a free action, even if they can't act.

items.name: Extradimensional Immunity
items.description: Syndara can foil any attempts to use planar powers against him. He is immune to all extradimensional effects, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7], but can choose to be affected by such effects normally.

items.name: Gateway Onslaught
items.description:
Требования: Syndara is in the Glass Lighthouse

Эффект: Syndara folds the fabric of the Glass Lighthouse before opening several gateways from which dangerous elements spew forth. He teleports to his throne, regardless of distance, then makes three elemental gateway Strikes. Each Strike must target a different creature. He can't use Gateway Onslaught again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Gateway Onslaught]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Planar Restructuring
items.description:
Требования: Syndara is in the Glass Lighthouse

Эффект: Syndara exerts his will over the Glass Lighthouse to cause one of several effects. The effect is magical, but Syndara isn't using magic when he takes this action-just triggering a magical effect he already set up. The level for each of these effects is 10, and any save is DC 45. Syndara or Syndara's Reflection can't use Planar Restructuring for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Planar Restructuring]]{1d4 rounds}.

- Accelerate/Decelerate Syndara affects the flow of time around a target within 60 feet, affecting them with either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3].

- Deny Syndara rejects the existence of a power other than his own, affecting an object with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ihbRf964JDXztcy3].

- Rewind Syndara rewinds time to undo harm. He or his reflection are affected by the two-action version of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs] or by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnaLVgxZ9ryUFmUr].

- Rise Syndara creates a gravitational nexus of reverse gravity.

- Sequester Syndara folds space to affect a creature with resilient sphere.

items.name: Темпоральный шквал
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Syndara bends time to make multiple attacks. He makes three unarmed Strikes. If multiple attacks hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Vicious Impact
items.description:
Syndara has had an eternity to reflect on his own weaknesses and the weakness of others. If he critically hits with a melee Strike, he can target the eyes, joints, or other weak points to add one of the following effects of his choice unless the target succeeds on a @Check[fortitude|dc:46] save.

- The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

- The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute.

- The target takes @Damage[3d6[bleed]].

- The target can't Step for 1 minute.

items.name: Walk the Spiral
items.description:
Требования: Syndara is in the Glass Lighthouse

Триггер: Syndara Strikes a creature on his own turn

Эффект: Syndara rotates the space of the Glass Lighthouse around himself to carry him to a distant location in an instant. He Strides twice. This movement doesn't trigger reactions. If his next action is to attack a different target than the triggering creature, he gains a +1 circumstance bonus to that attack; each time he Walks the Spiral in a turn, this bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +3.

Taiga Yai.name: Taiga Yai
Taiga Yai.description: Wearing the visage of taiga giants, taiga yais generally travel in a solitary fashion, always yearning for new experiences and destinations. They are zealous in their love of nature in its purest form and gleefully destroy any established civilizations that they encounter before continuing onwards.
Taiga Yai.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

items.name: Botanic Interruption
items.description:
Триггер: The taiga yai is standing in natural foliage or undergrowth and is targeted by a melee attack

Эффект: The taiga yai infuses their power within the plants around them, causing the plants to shoot up and create a protective barrier. The taiga yai gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack roll. If the attack misses, the attacker must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:33] save. On a failed save, the attacker is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] for 1 round as the plants grab hold of them; on a critical failure, the attacker is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Return to Nature

Tamikan.name: Tamikan
Tamikan.description:
Though they resemble pterosaurs and hail from a similar era, kongamatos are actually a primeval branch of dragonkind. They aren't particularly intelligent and lack the powerful magical abilities that many of their dragon kindred command, but a kongamato has a supernaturally strong beak that can punch through incredibly dense substances. While this beak might seem like a valuable trophy for hunters, its magic dies with the kongamato, and all attempts to integrate them into weapons have failed.

Though they dwell in swamps and other still waters, kongamatos prefer to hunt in rivers and streams, since running water delivers new prey on a regular basis. The predators hunt everything, and they are well aware their powerful beaks can sink boats and rafts. They even possess a semblance of draconic greed. While they care little for the material wealth or societal power, kongamatos claim large hunting territories, violently attacking any would-be rivals and ravenously slaughtering large animals in their territory, leaving carcasses half-eaten with little regard for whether they'll still have meals in the future.

When a kongamato claims a territory that encapsulates a community, the people there have no choice but to hunt down the vicious predator or hire adventurers to do so on their behalf. Kongamatos' hunger is such that a single one can devastate entire herds of livestock and threaten the safety of the entire community. Unlike their draconic relatives, kongamatos ignore attempts to bargain with them, and efforts to appease them through regular sacrifices have no effect.

Когда вы инвестируете эти расшитые полоски ткани, то должны медитировать и медленно обматывать их вокруг ваших рук. Эти обмотки имеют гравированные на них оружейные руны, чтобы давать вашим безоружным атакам преимущества этих рун, что делает ваши безоружные атаки похожими на магическое оружие. Например, разящие повязки могучих ударов +1 дают вам бонус предмета +1 к броскам на атаку с ними и увеличивают урон от безоружных атак с одной кости урона до двух (обычно 2d4 вместо 1d4, но если у ваших кулаков другой размер кости урона или у вас есть другие безоружные атаки, то используйте их кости урона).

Вы можете улучшать, добавлять и переносить руны с повязок и на повязки, как с обычным оружием, а так же можете прикреплять к повязкам талисманы. Для этих целей считайте повязки как оружие ближнего боя из группы "драка" с лёгкой Массой. Руны свойств применяются только когда они могут быть применимы к используемыми вами безоружными атаками. Например, свойство, которое должно применять к рубящему оружию не будет функционировать когда вы атакуете кулаками, но вы получите эти преимущества если атакуете когтями или другой рубящей безоружной атакой.

Tyrannosaurus Imperator.name: Tyrannosaurus Imperator
Tyrannosaurus Imperator.description:
Widely regarded as the king of the dinosaurs, the tyrannosaurus is a massive predator with a wide mouth filled with viciously sharp teeth. Thundering beasts of fury and hunger, tyrannosauruses are bold and fearless carnivores that eagerly bite off great hunks of large prey and swallow smaller prey-such as most humanoids-in a single gulp. Although they can subsist on carrion, tyrannosaurs prefer live prey.

Tyrannosauruses stand on two wide, powerful hind legs that allow them to run quickly, and their thick tails provide them with exceptional balance. Although a their small forelimbs are of little use other than to hold prey in place while the predators tear at their victim's flesh with their fearsome jaws, even these forelimbs bear sharp claws several inches long. As fearsome as tyrannosauruses are alone, they sometimes hunt in packs to take down massive prey. Only the most powerful creatures can successfully train tyrannosauruses, and even then, only when they can provide the ravenous beasts with a steady diet of meat.

Some tribes of giants, particularly cyclopes or more obscure denizens of primeval lands, have even trained tyrannosauruses as mounts or beasts of war. In other places, xulgaths feed these prisoners to these mighty dinosaurs as part of executions or ritual sacrifices. Some xulgath cults even revere tyrannosaurs as incarnations of their violent demonic demigods. For their part, tyrannosaurs who have grown used to having their meals provided in this manner are remarkably well-behaved toward their feeders and keepers. Tyrannosauruses are 50 feet long and weigh 7 tons or more.

Other variants of the tyrannosaurs include slightly smaller dinosaurs such as allosaurus, or even larger like ravenous giganotosaurus. Even the smallest tyrannosaurs, nanotyrannus, are never than large in size, yet despite this stature, they no less ferocious, and those who would assume that a nanotyrannus is "safer" to train do well think again!

The creature falls 25 feet (assuming the tyrannosaurus flings it as high as it can) and takes falling damage accordingly (@Damage[12[bludgeoning]|options:fall-damage]). If the flung creature lands on another creature, the creature it lands on takes the same amount of bludgeoning damage. The creature being landed upon can attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save.

A tyrannosaurus gains a +2 circumstance bonus to attack a creature it has pinned in this manner, but it cannot use swallow whole on the target unless it uses its jaws to Grab the victim first.

Многие полтергейсты погибают в результате сильной эмоциональной травмы или под её воздействием.

Watchtower Shadow.name: Watchtower Shadow
Watchtower Shadow.description: The mysterious undead known as shadows lurk in dark places and feed on those who stray too far from the light. Those who parley with shadows, typically by keeping them at bay with a glowing weapon, may learn great secrets, for they are ideal spies.

Watchtower Wraith.name: Watchtower Wraith
Watchtower Wraith.description:
Wraiths are malevolent undead who drain life and shun light. Their shadowy, incorporeal forms are dotted with burning eyes that reffect their hatred for the living, and shadowy claws are weapon enough to steal the vitality from their enemies. A wraith may be created by foul necromancy, but more often they are the result of a hermitic murderer or mutilator who even in death could not give up their wicked ways. Further complicating the matter is the fact that wraiths multiply by consuming and transforming the living into more of their foul kind-meaning a handful of wraiths left unchecked can easily turn into a horde of darkness.

Wraiths weigh nothing and are unharmed by most physical attacks. They haunt any place where they can feed on the living, though their vulnerability to sunlight confines them to the shadowy places of the world-places where they can blend in seamlessly with their dark surroundings before silently engulfing their prey.

Wraiths may form packs with others of their kind in places where death and mayhem are commonplace-countrysides ravaged by war, metropolitan underworlds run by criminal overlords, or sites of fiendish cultic rituals. In these places, the living do well to tread with sunrods and powerful clerics in tow. Ruins, sewers, and abandoned buildings provide sanctuary for wraiths during the day, as the creatures hunt exclusively at night or in dark places. Wraiths are smart enough to take advantage of their incorporeality in combat, so they keep to tortuous caverns or structures with hallways and avoid open areas.

As they're formed purely of anti-life from the Void, wraiths pervade that unholy realm. Within nations and civilizations ruled by the undead, wraiths have places of power as assassins and spies. They're among the ruling class in Geb, but have greater numbers in Ustalav, where packs of wraiths roam graveyards and misty trails, consuming the populations of entire villages. In other parts of the world, wraiths tend not to wander and limit their activity to smaller environs, typically just the site of their chosen haunting and its immediate surroundings.

items.description:
Активация: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]

Бомба-липучка наполнена клейкой субстанцией. Когда вы попадаете липучкой по существу, оно получает штраф состояния −15 футов к своим Скоростям на 1 минуту. Вы получаете бонус предмета +2 к броскам атаки.

При критическом попадании существо, находящееся в контакте с твёрдой поверхностью, приклеивается к ней и становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Обездвижено} на 1 раунд, а у существ, летающих при помощи крыльев, крылья запутываются, из-за чего они безопасно приземляются на землю и неспособны снова "Лететь" 1 раунд. Бомба-липучка неэффективна для использования против существ в воде.

Цель может закончить любые эффекты, [[/act escape dc=28]]{Вырвавшись} или потратив в общей сложности 3 действия @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F], чтобы аккуратно убрать клейкую субстанцию. Эти действия "Взаимодействовать" не обязаны быть последовательными, а другие существа также могут помочь своими "Взаимодействиями".

items.description:
Триггер: A creature within Yarrika's reach is hit by an ally's melee attack

Эффект: Yarrika makes a mantis strike against the triggering creature

items.name: Occult Strike
items.description:
Триггер: Yarrika casts an occult spell

Эффект: Yarrika makes a fist Strike against a creature within reach.

Yoh Souran.name: Yoh Souran
Yoh Souran.allSaves: +4 to all saves while piloting Solar Jian II

items.name: Punch It
items.description:
Частота: Раз в час

Требования: Yoh is piloting an airborne vessel

Эффект: Yoh pushes the ship, tripling its speed for 1 round. After this point, the ship stalls-though it Hovers in place, it can't move under its own power for 1 round.

items.name: Ancestral Airship Link
items.description: The Solar Jian II recognizes Yoh as a descendent of its creator, and the magical ship extends him protections beyond those that would be given to most other pilots. If Yoh is piloting the Solar Jian II, his AC and saves are increased by 4.

items.name: Shake 'Em!
items.description:
Требования: Yoh is piloting an airborne vessel

Триггер: One or more creatures aboard Yoh's vessel are the target of an attack or attempt a Reflex save and the attacker is not aboard the ship

Эффект: Yoh attempts evasive maneuvers. All creatures aboard the vessel gain a +2 status bonus to their AC and saves against the triggering effect.

items.name: Deploy Countermeasures
items.description:
Частота: Раз в час

Требования: Yoh is piloting the Solar Jian II

Эффект: While the Solar Jian II is not a combat vessel, it does have a magically renewing supply of fireworks for victory parades and the like. Yoh fires them at a @Template[burst|distance:20] within 60 feet. Creatures in the area take @Damage[3d6[fire],3d6[sonic]]{3d6 fire damage and 3d6 sonic damage} with a @Check[fortitude|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] for 1 round.

Провал: The target takes full damage and is dazzled for 3 rounds.

Критический провал: The target takes double damage, takes @Damage[3d4[persistent,fire]] damage, and is dazzled for 1 minute.

items.name: I'll Get You into Position!
items.description:
Требования: Yoh is piloting an airborne vessel

Эффект: Yoh pumps the brakes, banks quickly, or performs some other aerial maneuver to get the drop on an enemy. He attempts a Piloting Lore check against the enemy's Perception DC. If he succeeds, that enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to the next attack from a creature onboard as long as it is made before Yoh's next turn. All enemies who witnessed the maneuver are then temporarily immune for 1 day.
